---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1a17e99b-08b5-4e5e-aad9-622cffdaaa62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Twenty-four years ago, on 9/11, the world changed forever.
In some ways, it feels like it was a simpler world then.
But back then on September 12, something remarkable happened: we were united. Flags hung from porches, firehouses, and overpasses. Democrats and Republicans stood intertwined together on the Capitol steps and sang _God Bless America_. Lee Greenwood's "God Bless the USA" shot back up the charts and became an anthem of patriotism. For a brief moment, it felt like America knew itself and had never been prouder.
Fast forward almost two and a half decades, and the American flag doesn't mean the same thing it once did. For me (and a shrinking majority), it still symbolizes freedom, pride, and sacrifice. For others, especially younger generations, it feels like a symbol of whoever's political party happens to be in power. The Gallup Poll shows that [American pride has reached record lows.](https://substack.com/redirect/aa6d1afc-7d80-40ff-9078-04e1d5c57381?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I've spent much of my adult life in some type of public service, and I can say with some authority: the unity we saw after 9/11 is rare. But I can also say it shouldn't take a national tragedy 24 years ago today, or another case of political violence a day ago, to remind us that we belong to one another.
Yesterday, Charlie Kirk--a 31-year-old father, husband, and prominent conservative leader--was assassinated in cold blood before thousands of people at Utah Valley University. He was one of Donald Trump's earliest and most vocal supporters, amassing millions of followers online and becoming a face of the young conservative movement. Many of his views were objectionable to liberals. But he didn't deserve to lose his life for holding them.
I didn't agree with his politics, but I loved that he had the moral courage to stand on his own two feet and make an argument and debate eloquently on the principles he believed in. On the day of his assassination was doing what he loved and did best, going into a college town and asking folks to debate, to prove him wrong. Until a gunman violently took him out.
Already, some of my conservative friends are calling for retribution after Kirk's murder. They're blaming "the liberal left," pointing to the two assassination attempts on President Trump and the shooting of Majority Whip Steve Scalise in 2017.
But political violence is not a partisan issue.
Those same voices were silent when Speaker Nancy Pelosi's husband was bludgeoned in his own home with a hammer. They said little after [the arson attack on Governor Josh Shapiro's home on the first night of Passover](https://substack.com/redirect/4570c2c4-fa7f-4add-9c68-15817d662d51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or the killing of Minnesota House Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband.
It's become a knee-jerk reaction to immediately blame the other side. To falsely proclaim there are millions celebrating this political violence.
Yesterday, every major Democrat mourned the shooting (and eventual death) of Kirk.
In the past year alone, we've seen a frightening [escalation in political violence](https://substack.com/redirect/fbeb3313-98a6-4279-af39-0d21455c4afd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
That's what scares me. Twenty-four years ago, when tragedy struck, Americans could still come together and agree that violence was wrong. We united to bring Al-Qaeda terrorists to justice. As President George W. Bush declared while standing on the smoldering rubble at Ground Zero, "I can hear you. The rest of the world hears you. And the people who knocked these buildings down will hear all of us soon."
Today, though, every tragic event is filtered through a partisan lens. Tragedies are dissected into talking points. And in rare corners of the internet, Kirk's death has even been celebrated with mocking derision. The man was a staunch gun advocate but that does not mean he deserved to die by one.
We don't have to agree with one another to recognize each other's humanity. In fact, our democracy depends on it.
I'll admit something here that most of you probably don't know: I voted for George W. Bush in 2000. I was a young Army Captain at West Point on active duty, and he was a former military man who promised to be a "Compassionate Conservative." Within months after 9/11, I was sent overseas, deployed home, and then became part of the invasion force in Baghdad, Iraq in 2003. I was wearing the uniform of an Army officer, serving in a second front of a war President Bush launched after we were attacked. My views shifted from serving overseas, and I later worked on John Kerry's campaign in 2004 after leaving active duty. When I was elected to Congress in 2006, I later helped write the Iraq De-Escalation Act with then-Senator Barack Obama, that called for a phased redeployment of our troops from Iraq. It was somewhat controversial because it called for a timeline, but he worked the Senate while I worked votes in the House. It passed. And then President Bush then vetoed my first piece of legislation. I went from being an early supporter to a vocal opponent.
But no matter what, I've always been firm that it's possible to disagree fiercely with a leader and still acknowledge the good they've done.
Can you do the same? If you're a Democrat, can you name three good things President Trump has done in either term? If Republican, can you name three things that President Biden or Obama have done? If you can't, maybe it's time for you to break your partisan fever. Humble empathy or intellectual humility shows true power and wisdom.
It is easy for me to point to the good Bush did as our President (even though I actively campaigned against him the second time). He proudly signed the largest expansion of the GI Bill since World War II after we passed it in Congress. He later extended unemployment insurance during the Great Recession. He created a public-private partnership to combat HIV/AIDS in Africa that has saved over 25 million lives. Two years later he launched an anti-Malaria jnitive which saved another 7.6 million. President Bush showed the world through action how substantial American leadership is when it comes to global public health. Yet, he never won a Nobel Peace Prize, but maybe he should have. It's widely considered one of the most successful humanitarian initiatives in U.S. history. Frankly, maybe President Trump was also snubbed a Nobel Prize too for Operation Warp Speed that expedited the mRNA vaccine, saving tens of millions of lives across the globe during the the COVID pandemic.
I've never called for either of them to receive the world's most prestigious award, but maybe I can learn to be more gracious and have more intellectual humility as well.
President Bush also had the most diverse Cabinet in history at the time. He appointed the first Black Secretary of State (Colin Powell), followed by the first Black woman Secretary of State (Condoleezza Rice), and the first Latino Attorney General (Alberto Gonzales). It wasn't diversity for diversity sake, it was an all-star cast of statesmen and women.
A week after 9/11, Bush attended the Islamic Center of Washington, D.C. and declared ["Islam is peace,"](https://substack.com/redirect/cdfe471c-e411-4ed5-8ad6-51e4026d2d48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) urging Americans not to scapegoat Muslims. That moment often gets overlooked. That took political courage.

Bush had his flaws, but one thing you can't say is that he wasn't a class act.
If you can't name a single positive quality in a leader of the opposing party, you're not just wrong, you're part of the problem. Do better.
The truth is, our nation was built by leaders who crossed party lines. John F. Kennedy, a Democrat, was a Navy lieutenant in World War II and lowered taxes as President Dwight Eisenhower, a Republican, was a five-star general who helped defeat fascism and then invested in our transportation infrastructure at home. George H. W. Bush, a Republican, flew combat missions in the Pacific before serving as CIA Director, Vice President, and eventually President, and signed the Americans with Disabilities Act, which protected those with physical and mental disabilities while guaranteeing them access. These veterans showed that political public service wasn't partisan. It was simply patriotic.
I think about that a lot today. Because while we can't bring back the America of 9/12, and we genuinely mourn the loss of Charlie Kirk, we can decide that our political opponents aren't our enemies. That they may hold values we disagree with, but they are still Americans with redeeming qualities, worthy of our respect and dignity as fellow humans.
Twenty-four years after 9/11, I still remember the shock and grief. But I also remember the unity. And if we could summon that again, it might be the best way to honor those we lost.
So today, if you want to do something meaningful, try this: name one good thing about a leader you usually oppose. Do it out loud. Write it down. Have the moral courage to put it in the comments here or on your own social media. Remind yourself that democracy isn't about destroying the other side. It's about recognizing their humanity, even when you disagree.
It's poetic that this year, I was asked by President Bush and his team to attend his presidential library in Dallas on 9/11. It is an incredible honor to be here on this solemn day. After moments of silence, I'm addressing veteran leaders from across the country who are gathering together in the same room - no doubt with different views and political beliefs - but one shared love of country and a commitment to serve others.
That is how we honor the memory of those lost twenty-four years ago. That's how we should mourn the tragic loss of Charlie Kirk. And that is how we keep this fragile experiment in self-government alive. United we stand, divided we'll fall.
-- Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

name: Shocking
subject: Trump says he will use Kirk tragedy to crush Democrats
body:
Before a suspect was even in custody and the facts were even known, Donald Trump jumped online—not to calm the nation, but to launch a vengeful rant blaming Democrats for Kirk’s death.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eq6AwZ7Hdy7QV2X0PwM8ZDxaMDQHwPzXNUYLC3TOCu2yCBStvLBAT7OvujprkRT89pG4-8V3c39Bcxg-ZmQgKknGJwrpYvyUdvuzN_YvZPJ2A1_EfRZ3m1_OxTYw93oS5tOWzJujOuu0AUCVJa9O579tnJ4ZKK0YVw0xJiSVfEKJ1-s_qcuTvYfr2HTqxTgbjZIOv4HSwgMxjYoZ3lZLjCT4NPZACMbcWYYfpr_op3A=&c=aW_NSDF1pRacVNPyXIG3sKHJIz3OSOrCMyT20cKP21k_hna_2eQmJA==&ch=4r5dZwCtzdiRkFroVaLmb-eGycKQ4lZUnvg2i2dmD__H77pdTv1KTA==)
---
| Peter,
The assassination of Charlie Kirk is horrific. Defend Our Courts condemns political violence in the strongest terms. Violence has no place in a democracy.
But before a suspect was even in custody and the facts were known, Donald Trump jumped online--not to calm the nation, but to launch a vengeful rant blaming Democrats for Kirk's death:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eq6AwZ7Hdy7QV2X0PwM8ZDxaMDQHwPzXNUYLC3TOCu2yCBStvLBAT7OvujprkRT89pG4-8V3c39Bcxg-ZmQgKknGJwrpYvyUdvuzN_YvZPJ2A1_EfRZ3m1_OxTYw93oS5tOWzJujOuu0AUCVJa9O579tnJ4ZKK0YVw0xJiSVfEKJ1-s_qcuTvYfr2HTqxTgbjZIOv4HSwgMxjYoZ3lZLjCT4NPZACMbcPnKvPYi4neY=&c=aW_NSDF1pRacVNPyXIG3sKHJIz3OSOrCMyT20cKP21k_hna_2eQmJA==&ch=4r5dZwCtzdiRkFroVaLmb-eGycKQ4lZUnvg2i2dmD__H77pdTv1KTA==)
---
| | | |
This isn't leadership--it's incitement. His reckless statement didn't just pour more fuel on America's epidemic of political violence--it also signaled that his administration is preparing to use this tragedy for an authoritarian crackdown on Democrats.
Throughout history, aspiring dictators have often used tragic and violent events to dismantle their political opposition and consolidate their power. We cannot allow Donald Trump to use this tragedy to do the same.
But that's exactly what Trump is plotting in Pennsylvania. He's trying to seize control of the state's Supreme Court in November's retention election by replacing three Democratic justices with MAGA loyalists.
If he succeeds, Trump will erase Pennsylvania blue seats through redistricting, rig future elections and pave the way for a third-term run--and stack the court against abortion rights, voting rights, and democracy itself.
We have less than 60 days until this election, and MAGA is outspending us ten to one. If the election were held today, we could lose everything. This is our line in the sand. [Can you rush $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to help Defend Our Courts stop Trump's authoritarian takeover?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eq6AwZ7Hdy7QV2X0PwM8ZDxaMDQHwPzXNUYLC3TOCu2yCBStvLBAT7OvujprkRT89pG4-8V3c39Bcxg-ZmQgKknGJwrpYvyUdvuzN_YvZPJ2A1_EfRZ3m1_OxTYw93oS5tOWzJujOuu0AUCVJa9O579tnJ4ZKK0YVw0xJiSVfEKJ1-s_qcuTvYfr2HTqxTgbjZIOv4HSwgMxjYoZ3lZLjCT4NPZACMbcp0VXPOj4yW8=&c=aW_NSDF1pRacVNPyXIG3sKHJIz3OSOrCMyT20cKP21k_hna_2eQmJA==&ch=4r5dZwCtzdiRkFroVaLmb-eGycKQ4lZUnvg2i2dmD__H77pdTv1KTA==)
---

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115005109/568883285/473596456?refcode=250911_MFC_Sherrod_CarvilleSigned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTdjNDgyYS0wYjhmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zf1Twqy1aDJav90YFsDljF2mGxXLrYDFrAgbxyjtxfg=) Friend, it’s James Carville. I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you: **Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now.** [**Please chip in every dollar you can spare to Sherrod and Seth Moulton's campaign. He just got back in the fight, and they need folks like you by his side ASAP.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115005111/568883286/473596456?refcode=250911_MFC_Sherrod_CarvilleSigned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTdjNDgyYS0wYjhmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zf1Twqy1aDJav90YFsDljF2mGxXLrYDFrAgbxyjtxfg=) We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on. We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd! _We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio._ Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people. **But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win.** [**Folks, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. But he can’t do it alone – nobody can: Will you chip in $5 or even $25 right now, split between Sherrod Brown and Seth Moulton, to power his campaign forward and send him to the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115005118/568883287/473596456?refcode=250911_MFC_Sherrod_CarvilleSigned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTdjNDgyYS0wYjhmLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zf1Twqy1aDJav90YFsDljF2mGxXLrYDFrAgbxyjtxfg=) Thanks, James Carville

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znei21ol2tgemb7mfk1h750lfl3cdmt2j5fpn65o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zidmug7fe3ge0aqd1gf0ukr3njurjd0ajdk7k1mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpo2f83rul1kj9qqc0hgueqnfo3qm8ugmj2lnhd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvnddghuvfma0do0c0dchhne8snog18kmrrp6l38_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrrmv70m3u6bf2un9ugsqorppeeqvk249vsqei6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkg2nir5b0t8gsq4lvagu0a15ho0snlh1ftqifk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvlsmdaef8vocejplh178btaiv1667i2dv82tg48_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhvl7a4kk9k2pkdn0q1c3snkd54rfo8aalfj2sn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5hufe5tve9orc2illrjhf6d25vmja54mne0m6vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znbei6k2brvb894ugn2s1mt1n7tclpkoivamj91g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvs0cs9do8c45kecj12ot88bvrkpe3jvvhhtiubo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdg69p34chh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---

Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named BRAVE Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome BRAVE Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), BRAVE Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking BRAVE Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So BRAVE Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of BRAVE Books , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, BRAVE Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines , TV personality Missy Robertson , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. BRAVE Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 **** | Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: 24 years ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://chrisforpa.com/ [https://chrisforpa.com/] Derek,

Today marks the 24th anniversary of the 9/11 terror attacks, one of the darkest and most solemn days in our nation’s history.

We mourn the nearly 3,000 lives lost, and we honor their loved ones and the brave first responders who rushed into danger. I also hold in my heart the passengers and crew of Flight 93, who showed extraordinary courage here in Pennsylvania, preventing an even greater tragedy and leaving behind a lasting legacy of American heroism.

After watching this country suffer under al Qaeda’s attacks that day, I felt a strong sense of duty and purpose. That’s a big part of why I headed off to the Naval Academy the following year, setting me on a course to serve in uniform that would take me on three deployments as an officer.

Stepping up to serve after our country was attacked was an easy choice for me: the values of patriotism and service run deep in our bones in Western Pennsylvania. We are a proud people, who have given this country a lot, and so many from our corner of the country gave their lives in the wars that followed that fateful day in September 2001.

I hope that we as a country always honor those sacrifices, and that we rededicate ourselves to this country and all her promises—because America is worth fighting for.

Sincerely,

Chris Deluzio
Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com to your address book. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you no longer want to receive our messages, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/z5DxLUzOH0Cbr-Ed1epOKA2?unsubscribedata=n7RM7dYSiET4wiu3TPnzU3RuCPn%2BDUmWsXdI2obqqjvHE%2B8%2BCrDu4uAOTU8deXpNLfnn1k2KvX0dSwb0gbrVQmKd6mUIWB%2FX5lJac89skKONiQKe91rgupCef8K7PZ17ALNvju6JtFVCgQMssa1D8GbPn05Z%2FM0tZ04D%2FNX3hAqksI6oVHmdC%2Ftj7SexQYNEfImsi8Bapszd2%2B0ldbP3XxjZWtNit6UjB0D1aNtKXIrGZAsI8faVVR8I3NTQmVNiKqk5A2hVJC60mAMNH0Zpg77%2Bl%2F8HrvKp2AgM%2FpLk9RqWYZkTbMZEs1UpFWE0CvbOkT%2B7vicdwS5XJM02%2BeI%2B5Kz37JT3039RC7It%2B1jFTeEjz%2BDHuqBG7dcX1K1vhTs0gm%2FWPY%2FykRgzQGDJe7YIJBFFr9HGWIeaoi0JxaOnFKHmt9%2Bb99B%2BT8hrqBdsgukD .
Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy or the Department of the Army.

Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242

subject: The Number 1 Washing Machine Hack I Wish I Knew Sooner
body:
Tired of musty-smelling laundry? This simple washing machine hack is going viral — and for good reason. It removes hidden mold, grime, and bacteria that regular detergents miss. Thousands are using it to get fresher clothes and a healthier home in minutes. No tools, no scrubbing, just a powerful clean. Discover the #1 washer trick people wish they found sooner!

| Is Your Washing Machine Making You and Your Family Sick?

**

| Don't judge me, okay? But I have to be honest... I'm a 39 year old woman, and I do laundry at my mom's house. I know some people could say that I'm too old to rely on my mother to get my laundry done, but I am a single mother, and I need every bit of help I can get. Plus, when I do laundry over there, it's a great excuse to spend time with her, which she likes, too. But something strange started happening. My laundry started smelling worse and worse, like rot and mildew. And every time I washed them, they smelled worse! I asked my mom if she knew what was going on, but she just shrugged. "It's a new machine, I don't know what to tell you," she said. I decided I had to take it into my own hands, so the next time I went over there, I had a plan. I ran the machine with just bleach, thinking that it could clean the machine and kill the smell. But nope. It smelled worse somehow! I asked my mom again to do something. I told her that my kids are stinking up the place at school, and that I don't want them to get bullied. "Can't you hire a plumber or something to figure it out?" I asked. But she just shrugged, "Why don't you just do your laundry at the laundromat if you want to make such a stink about it." But going to a laundromat? Not a chance. I was going to have to find a solution on my own. Then I had a lightbulb moment: I WOULD go to the laundromat. But just for information- I would ask the workers how they clean their machines. If I cleaned my mom's machine like they did, the stinky smell would be eliminated! When I walked in, I saw a man with coveralls and a name patch, Louis. I pretended like I wanted to do laundry there, then I asked him how he kept his machines clean. "Easy! We use Splash Spotless washing machine tablets," he said. "The dissolve throughout an entire hot cycle, slowly disintegrating," "They professionally scrub every nook and cranny of the machine "It foams up, so the soap can get to the bottom of the residue, washing it away "Leaving our machines clean and smelling so fresh!" I was impressed! These [Splash Spotless](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgrab810ik6135ncs280c3rrmc01n00bja02a36g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60o32cph2bs) tablets sounded great. I asked him if he used anything else, or just Splash Spotless. "Nope, just Splash Spotless!" he told me, "We tried other cleaning solutions, but Splash Spotless is the cheapest, plus it works the best using surfactant chemistry to eliminate the root cause of stinky machines." I hadn't even thought of the root cause! I asked him why machines start stinking. "Bacteria, ma'am" Mario looked freaked out, "Or as I like to call it--"washateria." They love a damp, humid, dark place, so washing machines are the perfect place for them to set up shop. We even saw on the news a few months ago about a customer getting sick from a bacteria-filled laundromat." "But that would never happen here, since we use Splash Spotless every 30 washes," he said, proudly. "Great!" I said, and started out the door. "Where are you going!?" he said, "Are you going to grab your laundry?" I laughed, "Nope, sorry!" name: Niki Conforti
subject: A Nation in Shock
body:
A Nation in Shock | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7f6f3f36a541/conforti-for-congress-10610792?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,
My thoughts and prayers go out to Charlie Kirk's wife and young children, and his extended family and friends.

Something changed in the soul of the country yesterday. The tragic passing of Charlie Kirk as a result of political violence is abhorrent and must be condemned in the strongest terms. Free speech is one of the pillars of America, and Charlie Kirk dedicated his life to championing open dialogue and civic engagement. He was a devoted American whose influence and discourse will not be forgotten.

We honor his legacy and recommit ourselves to protecting the principles for which he stood. He will live on in those that carry his work forward.

Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together!

Please consider a contribution to help us flip District 6. Your support will go a long way in helping us retake the district - and turn it RED.

Click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=aecaac4847&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate

clean_body: A Nation in Shock | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, My thoughts and prayers go out to Charlie Kirk's wife and young children, and his extended family and friends. Something changed in the soul of the country yesterday. The tragic passing of Charlie Kirk as a result of political violence is abhorrent and must be condemned in the strongest terms. Free speech is one of the pillars of America, and Charlie Kirk dedicated his life to championing open dialogue and civic engagement. He was a devoted American whose influence and discourse will not be forgotten. We honor his legacy and recommit ourselves to protecting the principles for which he stood. He will live on in those that carry his work forward. Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together! Please consider a contribution to help us flip District 6. Your support will go a long way in helping us retake the district - and turn it RED. Click the link below to make a donation today. Your support is greatly appreciated. | Thank you, Niki Conforti Candidate Illinois 6th Congressional District | PS: Follow my campaign on , , and ! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Conforti for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Andy Roth
subject: Charlie Kirk, RIP
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pLuC_D_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerb-2BCYrAMOX7yQP2g2GS16HTvGWg-2BRG3yz4HBEHzcjkmOixmhXoyxyckxDNX49vCi3K-2B6CZr4U8-2BD5e8ObBMJEjm1U5-2FHE-2BR5-2FyZ9-2FuUBOUQfQOMpRoy9f2CQDGRCWJjaa-2Bc5WGrMAiPhVqTzsTm3Z-2FzLNWxCoMz9iII4OgGXAYqsLK1r5BS-2FpjCHIpnCj0U0c-2BY-2BpQiFxdgYWOZmOTfSZ4UACWM8GWqupMgQ5M6L0Tlw-3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, The State Freedom Caucus Network staff and family are deeply heartbroken by yesterday’s unfathomable loss of Charlie Kirk. Charlie’s courage was boundless, and we may never know how many people were brought to the light through his words, leadership, and devotion to not just freedom in our country, but freedom in Christ. He will always be remembered as God’s tireless warrior for Truth. Most importantly, Charlie was a devoted husband and father. We pray for God’s mercy and supernatural comfort to envelop his family—especially his beautiful wife, Erika, and their two young children.Today’s horrific act was pure evil, and we must not allow evil to prevail. As we mourn the loss of a great American patriot—and an even greater man—we pray for swift justice to reign in this nation once more. May the peace of Christ comfort those crushed in spirit.
---
In Liberty,
---
---
Andy RothPresidentState Freedom Caucus Network
---

name: Ilhan Omar for Congress
subject: The indefinite detention of a child
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Mohammed Zaher Ibrahim is a 16-year-old Palestinian-American citizen who was arrested by Israeli forces in the West Bank back in February.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-ibrahim/?source=em250911-1-180&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)
Friend, Mohammed Zaher Ibrahim is a 16-year-old Palestinian-American citizen who was arrested by Israeli forces in the West Bank back in February.
He has spent the last six months in a notoriously brutal Israeli prison where he awaits a hearing simply for being accused of throwing rocks – accusations his family denies.
**The indefinite detention of a child is monstrous. As an American citizen, Mohammed should be able to count on his government to help.**
But when Mohammed’s family went looking for assistance, they found none.
They alerted their Republican congressman in their home district in Florida, who referred them to the state department, which only said that the US embassy in Israel was “following standard procedures”.
Embassy staff have been allowed to perform welfare checks, where they learned that Mohammed had lost an unhealthy amount of weight and had caught scabies. But despite these clearly inhumane conditions, nothing has been done.
Friend — Palestinian-Americans are still American citizens, despite the constant racism and discrimination that they face. Mohammed’s government should be fighting tooth and nail to get him out of this indefinite detention and reunite him with his family.
That’s why it’s up to us, the people in this movement who believe in the dignity of Palestinians and oppose Israel’s cruel treatment of kids like Mohammed, to help Ilhan apply diplomatic pressure.
**[Add your name today and help us send a message to the Trump administration and the state department that urgent action must be taken. Freeing American citizens from unjust and dangerous imprisonment should be a top priority of the American government.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-ibrahim/?source=em250911-1-180&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-ibrahim/?source=em250911-1-180&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)**
Thank you in advance for adding your name today.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1809_791427_3g3xcC&akid=1809%2E791427%2E3g3xcC)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie Kirk: A Life of Faith, A Legacy that Endures.
body:
Honoring the life and legacy of Charlie Kirk.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Fight Back Now
body:
Are you as FURIOUS as I am? The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zececqp8e2i3kdbiqqcdcr56gdpesm54a8psptk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60p74clh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbiki717n5jrtt5etcg6sr5nadl1h4dchrabo3mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60p74clh2bs) Dear Fellow Patriot Warriors,

**Are you as FURIOUS as I am?**

The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because **I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!**

That's right--outlets like **Wired** , **Politico** , **Washington Post** , and the rest of the press are screaming about how "**Laura Loomer is leading the charge to PURGE disloyal traitors "** from the National Security Council, FDA, NSA, and beyond.

**For the mainstream media, I 've become a headline of upheaval within the White House.**

For the government officials who are undermining Trump's agenda, **I 've become their biggest threat.**

But I need your help to keep researching and investigating. [**Please donate today to help me keep going.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb73hdtj3se17d4o5uoet1gnnee61albnqj84rn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60p74clh2bs)

I've been darting around the country as my small staff continues their work. I'm meeting with sources, verifying everything, and in between, when called to the Oval Office, I fly to Washington on my dime.

This is my job. I don't have a lobbying firm backed by corporate dollars. And I'm not being sponsored by anyone but hard-working Americans like you.

I know it's a lot to ask, but I'm doing this for us . . . so our nation can be strong and the president we elected can truly Make America Great Again. [**Will you help me?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpgb5plqc6v1s89rrgjpopsme2frrdq7tvqcn040_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60p74clh2bs)

From blasting bureaucrats who sabotage America First to forcing out deep-state snakes, **President Trump knows I'm the tip of the spear --and he's listening to US!**

The hundreds of articles about me aren't just headlines; it's a live reporting of the **WAR that 's going on for the heart of our nation**, and **WE'RE WINNING** because of relentless fighters like YOU and me!

My explosive exposes demand non-stop digging, dangerous travel to hunt down leads, and firepower to blast the truth across X and every platform that dares to let freedom ring. **[** Without YOUR immediate support**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z78rbiquduikn2dh1omrt3m2sb36gigc5bvcvof8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60p74clh2bs), the enemy wins--and we CANNOT let that happen!**

**[**STAND WITH ME IN THIS BATTLE RIGHT NOW!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlt5kevhr9qulnda0g3n3ok43fb3h52fop5ki3q0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60p74clh2bs)**

[**Chip in**$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can muster****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1dvjf7b2ikdn0aogqnhud3cv0d9ntum6ti5irmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi60p74clh2bs) to arm me with the resources to **CRUSH the corruption** , keep the purges rolling, and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN --FOR REAL!**

**Let's RAGE against the machine TOGETHER! America First or BUST!**

Unleashed and Unapologetic,
Laura Loomer

name: NEGOP
subject: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Yesterday was a rough day. Plenty of testimonials have been and will be written about Charlie Kirk in the coming days. Suffice it for me to say that all the positive comments about his kindness, his generosity, his intellect, his love of God, family, and country are true. When meeting Charlie in his early 20s, he exuded a potential for "greatness." I believe that he was assassinated so that his greatest strength, his ability to connect with people, could no longer be a force for the conservative movement among campus youth.
Foremost, Charlie brought his love of Jesus Christ to students. His love of Truth Incarnate fueled him as he brought truth and reasoned debate on campuses and across social media to students across the world. His energy and heart were bright lights in the conservative and MAGA movements.
Today will be a day to grieve and remember Charlie, but tomorrow will be a day to reorient our mission to include continuing Charlie Kirk's legacy and to embolden ourselves to be more courageous in our convictions and in sharing those convictions. I encourage others to do the same. No one can replace Charlie, but others can and must step up to take his place on campuses. He has shown us the way to win hearts and minds. That knowledge cannot be taken away.

Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| What's Happening:
>From the legislative desk of Jeanne Reigle.....
October Roundtable Schedule - join the conversations across our state! I encourage you to take part in upcoming opportunities to actively shape our democracy at the local level. These opportunities take on greater weight amid rapid changes concerning healthcare reforms and access, the cost of living and property taxes, and debates over illegal immigration. By attending in numbers, you participate in a civil and structured forum that helps Senators understand the real-world impacts of their decisions. It could also help shape upcoming bills or priorities. Public attendance encourages open discussion to address tough topics and reinforces democratic principles like representation and responsiveness. To make the most of it, prepare by researching the attending legislator's recent positions. Also, arrive early to visit face-to-face with Senators and foster ongoing connections.
Date: October 2 Event: Community Roundtable on Teacher Recruitment and Retention Location: Kilgore Memorial Library, York Time: 1:00-2:30 p.m. Featured: Senator Jana Hughes
Date: October 9 Event: Community Roundtable on Balancing Regulation with Economic Growth Location: Nebraskaland Bank, North Platte Time: 1:30-3:00 p.m. Featured: Senator Mike Jacobsen
Date: October 16 Event: Community Roundtable on Sustainable Property Tax Relief Location: TBD Featured: Senator R. Brad Von Gillern
Date: October 23 Event: Community Roundtable on Appropriations and Policy Debates Location: TBD Featured: Senator Loren Lippincott

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Breaking News: Charlie Kirk Investigation Underway
body:
New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=363aaae5f5&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |
We didn’t plan to send this today. [But the shocking events at Charlie Kirk’s Utah appearance changed everything](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a9cd17aa2d&e=567664f14c). At just 31, the Turning Point USA founder’s legacy — and the fallout from his death — are sparking a national reckoning.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f58d9491ee&e=567664f14c)
| |
🔥 **MAIN STORY: The Utah Event & Investigation
**
Charlie Kirk’s event in Utah turned into one of the most consequential moments in American politics this year. He was only 31, a husband and father of two young daughters. Turning Point USA, which he built from scratch, changed the political landscape for an entire generation.
**Key points:**
* Kirk was addressing thousands of students when tragedy struck

* Trump called him “legendary” and praised his work with America’s youth

* Just days earlier, Kirk warned: _“When people stop talking, that’s when violence happens”
_
* Prayer vigils broke out at Liberty University and campuses nationwide

**
Impact:** This isn’t just about one man. It’s about whether Americans can still speak freely — and disagree without fear.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=424d46e0db&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🚨 **MEDIA REACTIONS SPARK OUTRAGE**
Instead of uniting the country, MSNBC pundits Matthew Dowd and Katie Tur tried to spin Kirk’s story in ways that left viewers stunned. Their comments have already been blasted as inappropriate, and MSNBC was forced to issue an apology.
💔 **CONGRESS IN CHAOS**
When Rep. Lauren Boebert asked for a prayer for Kirk and his family, Democrats shouted her down — even dropping an F-bomb on the House floor. The refusal to unite in prayer after such a tragedy shows just how deep our divisions have become.
🇺🇸 **THE BIGGER PATTERN**
From the firebombing of Republican headquarters in New Mexico... to attempts on Trump and Justice Kavanaugh... to violent rhetoric from top politicians — America is seeing a disturbing trend. The Utah event is the latest and most devastating proof.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=38b676f1f3&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---

✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=25bcefd3f7&e=567664f14c) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=26677d3ff8&e=567664f14c)

name: Jason Ross, The LaRouche Organization
subject: Is this goodbye? 😢
body:
If we don't hear from you by Sept. 20, you will no longer receive our emails.

## Do you want to receive our emails?
---

Jason Ross

name: First Look News
subject: The Number 1 Washing Machine Hack I Wish I Knew Sooner
body:
Tired of musty-smelling laundry? This simple washing machine hack is going viral — and for good reason. It removes hidden mold, grime, and bacteria that regular detergents miss. Thousands are using it to get fresher clothes and a healthier home in minutes. No tools, no scrubbing, just a powerful clean. Discover the #1 washer trick people wish they found sooner!

| Is Your Washing Machine Making You and Your Family Sick?
---

****
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqu9hjbpbupn41j7s67rqkbc3pt2r4ajfmd7c5g8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs)
---
**
**

| Don't judge me, okay? But I have to be honest... I'm a 39 year old woman, and I do laundry at my mom's house. I know some people could say that I'm too old to rely on my mother to get my laundry done, but I am a single mother, and I need every bit of help I can get. Plus, when I do laundry over there, it's a great excuse to spend time with her, which she likes, too. But something strange started happening. My laundry started smelling worse and worse, like rot and mildew. And every time I washed them, they smelled worse! I asked my mom if she knew what was going on, but she just shrugged. "It's a new machine, I don't know what to tell you," she said. I decided I had to take it into my own hands, so the next time I went over there, I had a plan. I ran the machine with just bleach, thinking that it could clean the machine and kill the smell. But nope. It smelled worse somehow! I asked my mom again to do something. I told her that my kids are stinking up the place at school, and that I don't want them to get bullied. "Can't you hire a plumber or something to figure it out?" I asked. But she just shrugged, "Why don't you just do your laundry at the laundromat if you want to make such a stink about it." But going to a laundromat? Not a chance. I was going to have to find a solution on my own. Then I had a lightbulb moment: I WOULD go to the laundromat. But just for information- I would ask the workers how they clean their machines. If I cleaned my mom's machine like they did, the stinky smell would be eliminated! When I walked in, I saw a man with coveralls and a name patch, Louis. I pretended like I wanted to do laundry there, then I asked him how he kept his machines clean. "Easy! We use Splash Spotless washing machine tablets," he said. "The dissolve throughout an entire hot cycle, slowly disintegrating," "They professionally scrub every nook and cranny of the machine "It foams up, so the soap can get to the bottom of the residue, washing it away "Leaving our machines clean and smelling so fresh!" I was impressed! These [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbkhdl3t19crl6lug99td49qepi3ntup1mttjm6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) tablets sounded great. I asked him if he used anything else, or just Splash Spotless. "Nope, just Splash Spotless!" he told me, "We tried other cleaning solutions, but Splash Spotless is the cheapest, plus it works the best using surfactant chemistry to eliminate the root cause of stinky machines." I hadn't even thought of the root cause! I asked him why machines start stinking. "Bacteria, ma'am" Mario looked freaked out, "Or as I like to call it--"washateria." They love a damp, humid, dark place, so washing machines are the perfect place for them to set up shop. We even saw on the news a few months ago about a customer getting sick from a bacteria-filled laundromat." "But that would never happen here, since we use Splash Spotless every 30 washes," he said, proudly. "Great!" I said, and started out the door. "Where are you going!?" he said, "Are you going to grab your laundry?" I laughed, "Nope, sorry!" When I got home I looked up [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z111gvhhij6i354v7b20m9sgf0g541l629bhsh4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) online to check the reviews. I wanted to double check they worked before I spent my money. And holy reviews, Batman! Splash Spotless had 12,936 5 star reviews!
---
**
**

|
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkin1kq94volma1akgda6j9qobr139aof0l95mgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs)
---
**
**

|
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4ecv7abcd9nil0kcj572aelavecru2klv96vtno_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs)
---
**
**

| I hadn't ever heard of [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaoe3edhp987iiti83d5e9q0tqgc7ina23snji5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) before, so I decided to do a little research of my own before I went out and got one.
## What is it?
Splash Spotless tablets are easy-to-use washing machine cleaners that are safer and more effective than bleach. They keep your washing machine and clothes fresh for a whole month! Splash Spotless tablets work by deep cleaning your machine so that it stays clean for a month. Check out this short video to see how Splash Spotless works to clean your washing machine:

**

---
**
**

| Healthy, Happy, Family Health begins and ends with cleanliness. That's why hospitals are so concerned with being sterile. Splash Spotless tablets keep your washing machine clean, which is a key step. Clean, Fresh Clothes Is there anything worse than smelling bad? It is so embarrassing. [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsm6i3p1dq6j5pn61rf7l89nvvb4khj8mrisj25g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs)tablets guarantee that your clothes will smell great! Mold Preventative Mold is a dangerous and sneaky health hazard. It makes millions of Americans sick every year. Splash Spotless tablets prevent mold from one of its sneakiest home bases. Fresh Linens Throughout The House Your whole house is affected by the way your washing machine works. How can a house truly feel clean if the pillowcases smell like mildew, even just a little bit. There will be no more mildew scent with these amazing tablets. Extend washing machine life It is well known that if you take care of your things, they will last longer. [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfu7uvusrcra215tvi95abprvtv7362ohk9ph0d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) Tablets will keep your washing machine clean and running smoothly for many years to come. How Does it Work?
---
**
**

|
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs2q8ddljv9lkvpav0ct6gotbqic1plu60m1ntgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs)
---
**
**

| [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2p029stk7qjfmaaph19s8vnpe8lpab2krje9rn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) is easy to use every month! The truth is, not everyone can afford a new washing machine or expensive repairmen. That's why Splash Spotless works by simply dropping a tablet into your machine and pressing a button to start a cycle. While the machine runs, the tablet uses surfactant technology too slowly dissolve over the course of the cycle, sending powerful scrubbing enzymes into every nook and cranny. Then, Americans can enjoy life while [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8518o82ra84hoohlqc9j803529652gfjmid42k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) keeps your washing machine and home happy and healthy. No scrubbing needed!
## Is It Worth It?
Short answer--yes! Check out the ways that [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk724aqe98v3no47f1bgfr2qdfvoq6fdikf34928_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) saves you money:
### Splash Spotless v. A New Washing Machine
Affordable v. Expensive Easy v. complicated installation Do it yourself v. hire an expensive contractor Save the planet v. wasteful new item Guaranteed clean v. can have same problem! Just check out what these verified Splash Spotless customers have to say:
## No More Grime
"I didn't realize it, but there was a ton of grime building up in my washing machine. I found out the hard way--one of my little girls told me the other kids were making fun of her for being stinky. I was horrified! We always took good care of ourselves. When I realized the source of the stench was the washing machine, I thought we were going to have to get a new one. Luckily, our plumber is super honest and suggested Splash Spotless first. The results after just one tablet were incredible! Now, it is a part of my monthly routine."
## Grandma Stinks
"My grandma has been struggling, ever since my grandpa passed. The whole family pitches in to help, but people spend less time over there because it smelled so bad. I deep cleaned her house, and discovered that her washing machine smelled like rotten eggs. I tried scrubbing it with everything--bleach, apple cider vinegar, baking soda, comet, nothing worked. Then I saw an ad for Splash Spotless, and figured it was worth a shot, since there was a money-back guarantee. I'm so glad I did!! It works so well, and her house is totally fresh again!"
## Mold Allergy
"As someone with a lifelong mold allergy, I am always on the lookout for ways to get every single spore out of my life. I used to scrub my washing machine every week, killing my knees and triggering my allergies. Not anymore! Splash Spotless has eliminated the scrubbing and struggles--just pop it in and let it do all the work. It's eliminated the mold that hid from me, and my whole house feels fresher. Those testimonials were incredible! But I wanted to get an expert's opinion, too. Here's what Robert Jones, a doctor of toxicology, had to say: "The best way to take care of your washing machine is Splash Spotless, hands down. Did you know it works for your dishwasher, too? This is the kind of product I recommend to all my patients because it boosts your external immune system--when your home environment is clean and free of mold, bacteria, and germs, you are MUCH less prone to infections and illnesses. What makes Splash Spotless unique is its safe, natural, but powerful scrubbing enzymes, that really get into every nook and cranny of your machines, rooting out the "washateria" that can make your family sick. I highly recommend everyone protect themselves with Splash Spotless!" After reading the testimonials, and seeing what the doctor of toxicology had to say, I was starting to believe that [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuoqpud3h0kts8j939smieh7omqs46dnsnhqsh90_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) was right for me. And when I saw that there was a money-back guarantee, I knew I had nothing to lose, and everything to gain. I ordered a Splash Spotless right away. I wasn't going to take any chances! But when I clicked on the checkout, they said they were out of stock! At this point, though, I was determined. So I checked back every day until I could place my order. I breathed a big sigh of relief as I pressed the checkout button. Splash Spotless was on its way. When it arrived, I was impressed with how small it was--could something so small really be that powerful?? When it came, I raced over to my mom's house and dropped one in her machine, and started the hot cycle. And when the cycle was over... The machine smelled so fresh! And looked so clean! The way a washing machine should be. I did a load of my laundry and when it was done, it still smelled amazing! Splash Spotless had scrubbed every inch inside of the washing machine, removing any "washteria" was gone--all the built up grime of mold, germs or bacteria had been erased by Splash Spotless. Even my mom was impressed after she did a load of laundry herself. But she said she wasn't going to be that excited unless the machine was still clean a week later. It was! Even a month later, the smell was gone, but I used another [Splash Spotless](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg44qkv0qa205e0dmqug94oe3e7s4vsv9ieri248_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi64pr6clh2bs) just in case. It says on the box to use once a month for best results--too easy! After I realized how amazing Splash Spotless is, I've been buying them for family and friends as an easy present--and they love it, too! I am THRILLED with Splash Spotless. It rescued me from having a stinky family--or having to go to the laundromat. Splash Spotless is currently offering a 50% off discount in recognition of World Health month, so don't wait. I ordered a 2 years supply (which actually didn't cost very much at all!)

The way a washing machine should be. I did a load of my laundry and when it was done, it still smelled amazing! Splash Spotless had scrubbed every inch inside of the washing machine, removing any "washteria" was gone--all the built up grime of mold, germs or bacteria had been erased by Splash Spotless. Even my mom was impressed after she did a load of laundry herself. But she said she wasn't going to be that excited unless the machine was still clean a week later. It was! Even a month later, the smell was gone, but I used another just in case. It says on the box to use once a month for best results--too easy! After I realized how amazing Splash Spotless is, I've been buying them for family and friends as an easy present--and they love it, too! I am THRILLED with Splash Spotless. It rescued me from having a stinky family--or having to go to the laundromat. Splash Spotless is currently offering a 50% off discount in recognition of World Health month, so don't wait. I ordered a 2 years supply (which actually didn't cost very much at all!) Warm Regards, ** Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: Chairwoman Keesling's Statement on the Assassination of Charlie Kirk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** September 11, 2025

**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:greid@indiana.gop "greid@indiana.gop")**

**Statement from Indiana GOP Chairwoman Lana Keesling on the Assassination of Charlie Kirk** **INDIANAPOLIS (September 11, 2025)** – **“I, like so many of you, have been deeply shaken by the horrific footage and news of Charlie Kirk's assassination. There is no excuse for such an act of evil, and my prayers will remain with his wife, two young children, and those he held dear. Our nation joins you in mourning."** **"Charlie was the most outspoken defender of free speech and open debate of his generation, and to see him gunned down for his speech is a horror beyond words. He will be remembered as a champion of the values we hold sacred, and it is my sincere hope that the monster who carried out this vile act will be brought to justice as quickly as possible."** ###

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1514f263-04e5-4456-8713-2558ebf9981d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Believe me, I know asking this question is going to get some people (on the left) really mad, but given what happened yesterday... fuck it, here it goes. Here is why Charlie Kirk should be canonized into American history like MLK Jr., the Kennedy's and other generation-shattering political martyrs.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Rlykw3fv0Hzx5x-zOqw4bAvRrOHSkS57Ag9yXpSm3KM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173321668)
I know how you feel today; the rage and the sadness compete for the forefront of your mind. This is certainly a 'Turning Point' in the course of American politics and our next step forward is on shaky, brittle footing.
Charlie Kirk inspired me as a young conservative rabble rouser in college, eager to debate my communist professors and the sensitive libs in my classes. I would study and recite arguments he made in his TPUSA campus debate videos. His confidence under the pressure of a very hostile crowd gave me a sense of grounded righteousness as I became more politically active and outspoken on campus and in my career in journalism thereafter.
I wasn't unique, there was a whole generation of kids just like me who were drawn to conservative politics in large part by Charlie Kirk and the incredible work of TPUSA's campus outreach. I had a TPUSA pin on my backpack that I was given at one of their tabling events as a freshman that read "Big Government Sucks!"; a phrase that came to characterize my entire political worldview.
Kirk was an icon who truly moved the needle, or better yet, helped swing the pendulum BACK from the far left during a time when SJW's ruled campuses across America like a mafia of weirdos and political correctness and cancel culture had thoroughly ruined everything across America including comedy, movies, sitcoms, workplaces, romantic relationships, family dinners, etc. Everyone was on edge about everything. The left had won the culture war because conservatives didn't even know we were fighting one at the time. Kirk was one of the first to fight back.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Rlykw3fv0Hzx5x-zOqw4bAvRrOHSkS57Ag9yXpSm3KM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173321668)
I first learned about Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. in elementary school. He was a civil rights hero who fought and died for a righteous cause and should be known and remembered by all Americans in perpetuity for the lessons we can learn from his fight against injustice.
In his time, King was called a controversial, divisive and radical figure. Half the country thought he was the enemy while the other half revered him as a beacon of justice and resistance.
Kirk had an admittedly similar profile; he fought for free speech, for the rights of the unborn, for women's rights, for American citizens to come first in the priorities of their leaders, and for the forgotten working class of America who have been discarded by the elites and flippantly traded for low-wage overseas labor.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/56f15d81-4f27-4e57-830a-14801e2915a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/56f15d81-4f27-4e57-830a-14801e2915a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/56f15d81-4f27-4e57-830a-14801e2915a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/56f15d81-4f27-4e57-830a-14801e2915a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Lefties might even call him a class warrior. He was for God, Family and Country and stood for the values of middle America louder and prouder than anyone. The Democrats used to hold sway over the MAGA base, full of blue collar back-breakers, union workers and middle class grinders giving their all to get ahead in America. Kirk spoke to that sacred slice of the American pie as a peer and friend and won them over to the new GOP.
Kirk risked his personal safety each and every time he stepped in front of a crowd full of people who disagreed with him, and many who hated him, to debate them in an unscripted and free form format, live in front of the cameras for the world to see.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a950ca2-e2b7-48ff-9c9c-c923787eb349?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He was not a coward, he was brave. The gunman, hiding on a roof, far away, fleeing from police, is a coward. Cowards can't stand the brave - it prompts a self revelation so pathetic it can drive the coward to commit unthinkable deeds in the new light of their inadequacy.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Rlykw3fv0Hzx5x-zOqw4bAvRrOHSkS57Ag9yXpSm3KM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173321668)
Kirk's shooter was afraid of what he stood for, just like MLK's shooter was afraid of what he stood for. Freedom, equal opportunity and the right to be proud of who you are in this county characterize both MLK and Kirk's respective crusades. Both had a tremendous impact on this nation's political direction and should command similar reverence in the hindsight of American history in my opinion.
Kirk inspired millions of young Americans to speak loudly and without fear about their political beliefs and never discouraged conversation or debate with those who he disagreed with. These young Americans, who include myself, are ready to pick up and carry his torch forward and continue to build a better America.
He truly was a warrior for everything America is supposed to stand for and it's important that he and his message are never forgotten. He should now rank amongst the martyrs who died to teach America an everlasting lesson for generations to come.
Thank you Charlie,
Matt
* * *

name: Jim Marchant
subject: We Will Never Forget September 11
body:
Honoring the Fallen, Defending Freedom
| | | | | [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wbe0Cz54pnJjeK-EK0RmeASC5AgqNK38M77c5pCga2aTMyxPiFc1KF2kn738BHGnWC7NWOH0eJ8m_HJzYAc0-srXI5BOFb-J0Ir1GJprYWGi18Tm7P1afdj9XQeoe0w4Fs5SibY8aPdmCDKFV8pftX3qJur6EpsU&c=PH4f0C2URzHqHWcypItut3D4keA-s0Y4hIv-9nPGAreF-XDbIgkweg==&ch=qAjQGtVwqPXQNxOLWDTfZGpT1NklvuUavrOgPU9KoepTgEp4sN8nnA==)
---
| Peter,
---
Today, we pause to reflect on the events of September 11, 2001. Nearly 3,000 innocent lives were taken in a horrific act of terrorism, and yet from that tragedy rose stories of courage, sacrifice, and the unbreakable American spirit.
---
|
---
We honor the first responders who ran toward danger, the service members who answered the call to defend our country, and the families who have carried the burden of loss for more than two decades.
September 11 reminds us that freedom is never guaranteed; it must be protected. As Americans, it is our duty to remain united, vigilant, and committed to preserving the liberties that make our nation great. May God bless the fallen, their loved ones, and may He continue to bless the United States of America.
---

With deep respect, Jim Marchant Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress - NV01 [JimMarchant.com](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wbe0Cz54pnJjeK-EK0RmeASC5AgqNK38M77c5pCga2aTMyxPiFc1KF2kn738BHGnWC7NWOH0eJ8m_HJzYAc0-srXI5BOFb-J0Ir1GJprYWGi18Tm7P1afdj9XQeoe0w4Fs5SibY8aPeN6eQTvFiyRZKVOmS4BSpU&c=PH4f0C2URzHqHWcypItut3D4keA-s0Y4hIv-9nPGAreF-XDbIgkweg==&ch=qAjQGtVwqPXQNxOLWDTfZGpT1NklvuUavrOgPU9KoepTgEp4sN8nnA==)
---
| [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wbe0Cz54pnJjeK-EK0RmeASC5AgqNK38M77c5pCga2aTMyxPiFc1KF2kn738BHGnSqxzv8uurgYCvxn1ZcWpSQp3w1YzzI-hFY42_KBOFEPnwNsux3IcwGZpXDf8QMFWkhhzIAWHjmQq4_paQM-dtuZJ0599mQvf-Dx7vs0FFBo=&c=PH4f0C2URzHqHWcypItut3D4keA-s0Y4hIv-9nPGAreF-XDbIgkweg==&ch=qAjQGtVwqPXQNxOLWDTfZGpT1NklvuUavrOgPU9KoepTgEp4sN8nnA==) [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wbe0Cz54pnJjeK-EK0RmeASC5AgqNK38M77c5pCga2aTMyxPiFc1KF2kn738BHGn54zxSUcNfqSz6AzkI6AIzjyHFQ38uQQQO-HabyNTCLp9ugLEXZKyuz6iipl4CZ9-e8jhpqshL--YKaQL2Lbf_V99YRKWd_9Mq06xgxBy2ac=&c=PH4f0C2URzHqHWcypItut3D4keA-s0Y4hIv-9nPGAreF-XDbIgkweg==&ch=qAjQGtVwqPXQNxOLWDTfZGpT1NklvuUavrOgPU9KoepTgEp4sN8nnA==) [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wbe0Cz54pnJjeK-EK0RmeASC5AgqNK38M77c5pCga2aTMyxPiFc1KF2kn738BHGnWC7NWOH0eJ8m_HJzYAc0-srXI5BOFb-J0Ir1GJprYWGi18Tm7P1afdj9XQeoe0w4Fs5SibY8aPdMcfePTLQjuDvod2yA3YLt&c=PH4f0C2URzHqHWcypItut3D4keA-s0Y4hIv-9nPGAreF-XDbIgkweg==&ch=qAjQGtVwqPXQNxOLWDTfZGpT1NklvuUavrOgPU9KoepTgEp4sN8nnA==)
