name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth Will You Stand with Me
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znqu5vgush1r5cqd7l74bmv99psdf9fhsk4opq7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr0rnujcbkth9vjdg7eimf9jq1hb9qmlkvict3do_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z81r2pbp4ttfmlfooc0m0ro1nalrd98sp0jbiosg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfnjedjn488vudm5a7vnoe4ona44up60pu2od1do_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6lahj5o9vsg1rdg73petje2pan9sggsrunn38d8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdfimjd7tumu0q4ut7er9b2gr4nro4uokcnea518_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2mhnack57ofrhnldrg9v1pvr8c32lsta1nbssog_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3delp8ki2uvvishs8p0dmera94o3csfufu696qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlqbl4umm2mocsmr98l5ksrcga7u8td3c5qp31g8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb45pmfdf1rijp6mqsl161r0sgb0sdg2o4uldl58_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk5u54noma4vdr5irpr7no8s5ij1piv31a49vdm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr1mi4gsl8qdn4ee3l3lso3cgvdl210f11pl7oog_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5qm6skt8vm6dumfutd7hmfvcmhfk3g1pb6s9ug0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsrvnarb8bbjc43c1c8accmhu82ukubdmlu33gsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5169lt7pob9a9bro4uedbp54fdc5n7rvaj6e87o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpc8fi3s7nbd12kaur6kodh7t1grgqok6aae24kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqi6rhg8dceugjt9dksg638rn8urb7505pua1nlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsjrbjiu7clsmel3aq6gjbf0daoqin8n64tj3ki0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi6cor2c9h2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

subject: 🦴 Will you throw in a bone to Wes’ reelection campaign?
body:

Hiiii Peter,
It’s Tucker, Maryland’s First Dog and furry friend of Gov. Wes Moore. 🐾
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250911-1?refcode=em-20250911-1&refcode2=610_1086043_uUGAYP&akid=610%2E1086043%2EuUGAYP)
I’m here to let you know my dad, Wes, launched his official reelection campaign for governor of Maryland this week. While everyone else was working hard, I was keeping the campaign team company (and getting lots of head scritches.)
My dad is a great governor. He works hard every day for Maryland. So, I need to help him out. **[Please chip in a few bones to his campaign today!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250911-1?refcode=em-20250911-1&refcode2=610_1086043_uUGAYP&akid=610%2E1086043%2EuUGAYP)**

I’m paw-sitively grateful for your help. Plus, the more you give, the more table scraps will come my way. We call that a win win.
Now, let’s fetch four more years.
Thank youuuuu,
Tucker 🐾
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250911-1?refcode=em-20250911-1&refcode2=610_1086043_uUGAYP&akid=610%2E1086043%2EuUGAYP)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/look-to-charlie?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I heard a saying once...
_We can't keep going down the same road without eventually getting somewhere._
And now, in 2025, we're there.
Look at Europe where people rot in cells for speaking truth while "refugees" unleash hell in the streets, assaulting, raping, killing with impunity. Look at Australia. Look at any Muslim nation where freedom goes to die.
Did we really think we'd be immune?
That somehow America would remain untouchable while the world burned around us?
It's an ideological war we thought would never reach our shores.
But it didn't just reach them. It conquering them.
And as we swe yesterday, ideas have consequences.
And now, as it stands, America is the last flickering flame of freedom on a darkened earth.
And the demons are coming to snuff it out.
This is why our 1st and 2nd Amendments are everything. Because when they fall, America falls with them. When they go, we go.
And maybe we deserve it. Maybe this is God's judgment falling like a hammer on a generation so twisted it butchers children in the womb and mutilates them outside of it.
We deserve wrath.
But the Bible reminds us that _mercy triumphs over judgment._
So this is our moment to mourn, to weep, and to repent while there's still time.
_What I want is a reckoning._
But whether that reckoning comes through us or from God, only time will tell.
Today, this very day, I stand before junior high kids in our homeschool co-op to teach them about Charlie. This semester, I'm teaching argumentation and fallacies, but the real lesson runs deeper.
Knowledge. Wisdom. Character.
An effective ambassador for truth carries all three like weapons against the darkness.
And if you want to see what that looks like in flesh and blood, if you want a man worth following, worth emulating, a man who laid down his life for truth...
**Look to Charlie.**

name: John Pierce
subject: A Combat Veteran Needs our Help
body:
You’ve seen what happens to everyday Americans when they stand up to the Goliath of the Federal government. Their lives are leveled in an instant. Homes lost, families broken, careers destroyed, and their names ruined for life.

[****](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd84fei0nt2j76ghcv5ffpa2e8je63ud4qtvc9v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs) [****](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcpdnv9j7noot964nvcmmsa5qib065jl2qauha30_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

Cases against the Federal Government can lead to a labyrinth of secrets that dead-end in corruption and wrongdoing by individuals who hide behind their positions of power. I refer to these cases as "**Breachers** " because as soon as we kick in the door, the corrupt scramble and run.

Right now, **I have a Breacher on behalf of an honorable Combat Veteran who is risking it all to come forward,[**and he needs your help**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlrs9v5sl8dj89441g0lmvrl2hdt8un37046fmg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs)**.

[**I 'd like your support**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn3v5ar23p1385a14kukoemnavqckaj2s3i7sv38_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs) to help me and my team at the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU) navigate through a maze of locked doors to uncover a hidden world of corruption taking place right under our noses.

I'm John Pierce, a Harvard-educated attorney who has spent the last several years defending men and women from Joe Biden's relentless **political prosecutions of Americans involved in the January 6 th protests**.

While NCLU is pursuing 25 cases on behalf of Americans who desperately need our help, this **Army Veteran 's case is quickly evolving into a novel-worthy thriller **that will shock everyone when the truth is revealed.

Our client is Matthew, a principled patriot who served as a contractor for the Department of Homeland Security, initially starting his role at the tail end of the Biden Administration. Matthew didn't expect to be able to keep his job long, as he pushed back on **politically biased intelligence reports that created false narratives to tie anything they could to "right-wing" domestic terrorism.**

After Donald Trump's inauguration in January 2024, Matthew breathed a sigh of relief, believing he could finally work to keep Americans safe, rather than pursuing Joe Biden's agenda of suppressing political opposition through the force of government.

**Matthew 's relief quickly turned into pressure to keep his mouth shut** as his work began to expose secrets that led down a trail of corruption by a puppet master controlling the reins and massive contracts being awarded from DHS's $177 BILLION budget.

**Our client spent nearly 10 years in Iraq and Afghanistan, fighting and watching his brothers leave body parts or their lives behind in defense of our nation**. Despite the harassment and pressure being placed on him, **Matthew didn 't blink. He did what was right by blowing the whistle on wrongdoing** - and he was immediately fired and fears further retaliation if he continues to speak out.

[**Please help us protect Matthew so he can expose corruption without fear.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zc1ggg29mco36vjqcg3tvk3h2v53l8ogsbovlv6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs)

You've seen what happens to everyday Americans when they stand up to the Goliath of the Federal government. **Their lives are leveled in an instant**. Homes lost, families broken, careers destroyed, and their names ruined for life.

We can't allow that to happen to our client, as in the end, he's working to honor the oath he swore as a young man: **to protect and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and DOMESTIC**.

[**Join me in having Matthew 's back today by donating to his legal fund so he can fulfill his oath by disclosing the secrets they want so desperately to contain through his silence.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrkspt7stkuf6uocf36mhqcnbuan30nch4v6arkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs)

This case will be massive with fights to unveil every document and message that took place in secret by very powerful players who maintain the confidence of the President. And I'm confident that when President Trump has the facts laid before him, a reckoning will be had.

It's our job to make that happen, [**and it 's only possible with your support**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlbv3o621u47b2erg4rh5g9pnn32mbh7mbenu7jg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs).

**Donate today in support of NCLU** as we work to unveil this web of corruption by allowing a good man to speak.

In Vigilance, John M. Pierce
Harvard Law '00, NCLU Founder

P.S. We're in the evidence-gathering phase of Matthew's case, and the facts are shocking. Our requests for information are already being obstructed, which tells me they want to pursue my specialty: **Combat by Trial**. [**I 'm ready for the fight, but can only do it with your backing. Please donate today.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsih7gq20umklv6nc71q7rqb57j3592bu6ft0js0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs)

---

Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z30mede1j5k8fjthmfl1dj145iuo3ti4p28gi11o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31cjj6aoj7c8gq48bi4bh28pr5cthm8ob5c9im49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvq6nsnq536kbikctbgtiehogchen557u2m0bifg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb2clh2bs)_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood corruption
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth Will You Stand with Me
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z65efu0h43tu9nsub1vr67lft4809nkihqcabak8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1aem6a6ve2irva18jgid6ukbdc19dfi63tmh4a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuo9k8lc7d1l7af8pl98ku230j1apd7k754aiieg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z98s6a4ifqcoqht8l5oi5da4ose8noo2qfcncgrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zit28g7jk12gf361il43e9irvvl3tadq77na158o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztqoq7vkqer6skmt5l0ksit55peqg82gg6q535k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6l3cm38s8e9v32uk41o12fsak5r4omla43o35io_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3dhbl1psbsnknr0bv2t5j4himj4eual4on9q3hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0rvjn0tjjoo921i1ujd717i12g3p0669drd3o8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq9rn6rnbbe76vop6kklrql60tg0759on505k5no_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsiou75rdennq1iktcfm138jaukfkovbh53hd8cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0tkh7hgt8refp9vtdgk69q6pq2qfqq48b6mm50g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ajfdhm6nln5p252tt23gc4fv17d0d1dm2f6mt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlseft83d6o4addungd1v71aiebf49se46fq27q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze6rn27t59ef548ds2r5ljcovqs5p2hhrkn3qpkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhsaafmg6u4cshqfqd4eamkd8mrj4ir7kc8vcsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z055i29tp3kcl1nc3l3gf85v9m9mqdj9bbipqse0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z010g0g71cpuu93jiv0rd2kgaqlfv9nrdh35onkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zprjcgee78e04idm1b1vqhpmaj2atjtc6mrcf280_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z83o3dm5oka3psf1dgfe5mekt3pm4uv01s8m981o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni62p76clj60oh1k8gn48n24hjmapr3chgmapj6c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9h855ucqhsjtdcnvq79mgnkl2l14q1j4rtq3gug_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi62pb6cph2bs)_

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism. I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden. The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites. But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me. Your support isn't just a donation--. It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, and the fight for our Republic. Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, . Together, we can keep exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable. Thanks for standing with me, James O’Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Redistricting UPDATE via Our Revolution
subject: All eyes on Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1011&refcode=email-20250911_v&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

As more red states rush to follow Trump’s demand to rig their election
maps in his favor, this week all eyes are on Missouri as its legislature
pushes ahead with a new map to hand Republicans another seat.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?source=email-20250911&t=1062&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]Headline: Missouri Legislature advances new congressional maps amid
Trump redistricting push

This is Trump rigging the votes before anyone even heads to the polls
playing out in real time. And we need your help, right now, to stop it.

Democratic state representatives just waged a 100+ hour sit-in in protest
with Our Revolution board member Megan Green on the ground alongside our
allies at the Capitol in Jefferson City. And now we’re rapidly ramping up
our organizing machine to gather enough signatures to use this window of
opportunity to FORCE a statewide vote to stop it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250911nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]This is our chance to organize on the ground, fight back, and stop Trump
from stealing another seat. But we need to move quickly. Will you urgently
donate today so we can mobilize the grassroots army in Missouri to stop
Trump?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250911nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250911nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250911nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250911nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250911nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250911nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?source=email-20250911&t=1060&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]Photo from the protest against redistricting in MO

While Texas and California have gotten most of the attention, Trump has
been quietly pushing his cronies in Missouri, Florida, Indiana, Ohio and
beyond to redraw their maps to hand him even MORE seats.

On Tuesday, the Missouri House of Representatives passed Trump’s new map.
Now, the state Senate is gearing up to vote as soon as TOMORROW. Our
coalition is fighting back – joined by Our Revolution-endorsed State House
representatives and Our Revolution board member and St. Louis Board of
Aldermen President Megan Green. But we’re not stopping there.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?source=email-20250911&t=1061&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]Headline: Missouri Dems hold sit-in for 100+ hours to protest GOP
assault on Democracy

While Republicans may be able to pass the bill this week, Missourians have
a unique tool to stop this racist, blatant abuse of power: the citizen
veto. In Missouri, any bill can be put up for a statewide vote if
opponents gather enough signatures.

This tactic worked in 2018 when our allies were able to gather 300,000
signatures to repeal a right to work law. And now we’re gearing up to do
it again.

This is a fight we can win – but it’s going to take rapid fire grassroots
organizing to do it. Which is why Our Revolution is working hand-in-hand
with local partners on the ground, hiring organizers, training volunteers,
and launching a massive public education campaign. But statewide fights
like this don’t come cheap.

The right-wing machine is already in full swing, betting they’ll catch us
off guard. We can’t afford to let Missouri go under the radar. Because if
Trump wins here, he’ll roll this playbook out in every state he can.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250911nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]This battle is in our hands. Missouri voters can block Trump’s map – but
only if we show up, organize, and outnumber them. Can you chip in to help
make it happen?

Let’s send a message to Trump: we see what you’re doing, and we won’t let
you rig our elections. Together, we can protect the people’s voice – not
just in Missouri, but across the nation.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=9366%2E5885482%2E6RKKMT ]GIVE MONTHLY

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: They still hate us.
body:
Peter, I thought we’d only be remembering one tragedy today, but I was wrong. Yesterday, Charlie Kirk was killed on a college campus in Utah. He was only 31 years old.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, I thought we’d only be remembering one tragedy today, but I was wrong. Yesterday, Charlie Kirk was killed on a college campus in Utah. He was only 31 years old. This young man was known for boldly bringing common sense messages into often hostile college campuses around the country so the next generation could be exposed to more than the lunacy of the Left. And for that, this husband and father of two young children was gunned down. Shocking. Horrifying. Unacceptable. Today, our hearts break for the loss of this warrior and for his wife, Erika, and their children. We grieve with them and offer our prayers. In addition, we resolve to do what Charlie would want us to do: lean in, speak our minds, and continue to boldly bring common sense ideas to the public square – even to the places where those ideas may not be welcomed with open arms. Rest in Peace, Charlie. You are an example of courage and that legacy will live on. Now to the tragedy that changed us as a country 24 years ago. Any American over the age of 35 probably remembers where they were on September 11, 2001. I know I do. I’ll personally never forget the haunting sight of cars still parked at train stations, their owners never to return. Or the desperate and hopeful posters all over lower Manhattan seeking loved ones who would never be found. For New Jerseyans, it’s personal. Many of us knew someone in the towers that day. Maybe we were in the city. Or maybe we could see the mushroom clouds of smoke and ash from our homes or places of work. The beautiful New York skyline forever changed. Our sense of stability shattered. Our optimism tainted. It’s a day we’ll never forget. _Nor should we._ It’s a day to honor the memories of those who lost their lives, and the families who had to keep on living without them. It’s a day to honor the many who gave their lives and their best years fighting an enemy that was hard to identify and even harder to defeat. It’s also a day that should remind us never to let our guard down when it comes to our national security and never to underestimate those who hate us and seek our destruction. Because they haven’t gone anywhere. They’ve changed names, updated their marketing, reorganized, decentralized, or gone underground. But they still very much hate America and the freedom and way of life we stand for. The more we shine the light of freedom, the more they want to see us eliminated. America is a shining city on a hill. We’re polarizing. We draw hope and hate. Longing and anger. Peace and conflict. We also signal strength – under the right leadership – with a military that, despite its imperfections, is still the greatest fighting force in the world. The world is counting on us to be that light and to keep the flicker of freedom alive for those who can only dream of it. May we keep shining that light while remaining strong and vigilant. Where were you on 9/11? Let’s remember together. For New Jersey,
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---
Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

clean_body: Peter, I thought we’d only be remembering one tragedy today, but I was wrong. Yesterday, Charlie Kirk was killed on a college campus in Utah. He was only 31 years old. | | [ ]() Peter, I thought we’d only be remembering one tragedy today, but I was wrong. Yesterday, Charlie Kirk was killed on a college campus in Utah. He was only 31 years old. This young man was known for boldly bringing common sense messages into often hostile college campuses around the country so the next generation could be exposed to more than the lunacy of the Left. And for that, this husband and father of two young children was gunned down. Shocking. Horrifying. Unacceptable. Today, our hearts break for the loss of this warrior and for his wife, Erika, and their children. We grieve with them and offer our prayers. In addition, we resolve to do what Charlie would want us to do: lean in, speak our minds, and continue to boldly bring common sense ideas to the public square – even to the places where those ideas may not be welcomed with open arms. Rest in Peace, Charlie. You are an example of courage and that legacy will live on. Now to the tragedy that changed us as a country 24 years ago. Any American over the age of 35 probably remembers where they were on September 11, 2001. I know I do. I’ll personally never forget the haunting sight of cars still parked at train stations, their owners never to return. Or the desperate and hopeful posters all over lower Manhattan seeking loved ones who would never be found. For New Jerseyans, it’s personal. Many of us knew someone in the towers that day. Maybe we were in the city. Or maybe we could see the mushroom clouds of smoke and ash from our homes or places of work. The beautiful New York skyline forever changed. Our sense of stability shattered. Our optimism tainted. It’s a day we’ll never forget. Nor should we. It’s a day to honor the memories of those who lost their lives, and the families who had to keep on living without them. It’s a day to honor the many who gave their lives and their best years fighting an enemy that was hard to identify and even harder to defeat. It’s also a day that should remind us never to let our guard down when it comes to our national security and never to underestimate those who hate us and seek our destruction. Because they haven’t gone anywhere. They’ve changed names, updated their marketing, reorganized, decentralized, or gone underground. But they still very much hate America and the freedom and way of life we stand for. The more we shine the light of freedom, the more they want to see us eliminated. America is a shining city on a hill. We’re polarizing. We draw hope and hate. Longing and anger. Peace and conflict. We also signal strength – under the right leadership – with a military that, despite its imperfections, is still the greatest fighting force in the world. The world is counting on us to be that light and to keep the flicker of freedom alive for those who can only dream of it. May we keep shining that light while remaining strong and vigilant. Where were you on 9/11? Let’s remember together. For New Jersey, | [ ]() President Common Sense Club | Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Dear Reader,

[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21912/6374453/21a75664991338cf8e78447ea1eb72303c382e68/f538db3715e06b3cc71f85fcdd9ecfd224eecde4)You won’t see [**THIS**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21912/6374453/21a75664991338cf8e78447ea1eb72303c382e68/f538db3715e06b3cc71f85fcdd9ecfd224eecde4) in any history book...

But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...

Neil Armstrong reported a [**strange encounter**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21912/6374453/21a75664991338cf8e78447ea1eb72303c382e68/f538db3715e06b3cc71f85fcdd9ecfd224eecde4) he had in space during a post-mission debrief.

And he wasn’t the only astronaut to experience it.

NASA did their best to keep it secret...

But now, unearthed [**NASA audio**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21912/6374453/21a75664991338cf8e78447ea1eb72303c382e68/f538db3715e06b3cc71f85fcdd9ecfd224eecde4) is blowing the lid off of everything.

[**This official Apollo recording**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21912/6374453/21a75664991338cf8e78447ea1eb72303c382e68/f538db3715e06b3cc71f85fcdd9ecfd224eecde4) is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm back, Peter.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=091125_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=091125_1]
Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today , I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. Will you chip in $25 or more now – split between The Real Texas PAC and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=091125_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=091125_1&amount=25]
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won . When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won .
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.
I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now – split between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=091125_1]
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Steve Simon
subject: I’ve seen it firsthand
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115031008/568954962/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzM5MmI2ZDMtMjE4Zi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RC-i_e3b8qzfLhxOhpcCrVlI29MAdSOyS-q05EGdgPI=) | I’ve had the privilege of attending and speaking at naturalization ceremonies. They are among the most beautiful displays of patriotism you’ll ever see. Families cheer, new citizens sometimes cry tears of joy, and you can feel the gratitude for the opportunity to belong and to participate fully in our democracy. For decades, nonpartisan groups like the League of Women Voters have been there too, ready to help these new Americans take their very first step into civic life by registering them to vote. **Now, the Trump Administration has banned those groups from registering voters at naturalization ceremonies administered by federal agencies.** It is a cruel and unnecessary step that could silence the voices of new Americans before they’ve even had the chance to be heard. **[I will not sit quietly while our democracy is diminished in this way. We’re looking for 300 people to join us this week. clean_body: = | I’ve had the privilege of attending and speaking at naturalization ceremonies. They are among the most beautiful displays of patriotism you’ll ever see. Families cheer, new citizens sometimes cry tears of joy, and you can feel the gratitude for the opportunity to belong and to participate fully in our democracy. For decades, nonpartisan groups like the League of Women Voters have been there too, ready to help these new Americans take their very first step into civic life by registering them to vote. Now, the Trump Administration has banned those groups from registering voters at naturalization ceremonies administered by federal agencies. It is a cruel and unnecessary step that could silence the voices of new Americans before they’ve even had the chance to be heard. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | ******************=**************** | ****************=**************** | ****************=**************** | ****************=**************** | ****************=**************** | ****************=**************** When I see a newly naturalized citizen register to vote, I think about my own grandfather, who was born in Minnesota to Jewish immigrants fleeing persecution. Yes, that Karl Rove. The guy who shaped strategy for George W. Bush and

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Remembering the heroes of 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Their sacrifice will not be forgotten.

Today, we honor the memory of nearly 3,000 innocent Americans slain by terrorists in New York City, Virginia, and Pennsylvania.
They started that day, 24 years ago, like any other — driving on the highway, boarding a flight, brewing coffee at the office. But they never returned home.
The stories are seared into our collective memory, of passengers aboard the hijacked planes phoning home, first responders combing through the smoldering debris, and communities still in grief holding vigils for the fallen.
In the wake of the attacks, we set aside our politics and showed our unbreakable American spirit. It's an example we'd do well to follow today.
I hope you'll join me in remembering the heroes of 9/11 and standing with their loved ones. They were our friends and neighbors, and their sacrifice will not be forgotten.
\- Abigail
Paid for by Spanberger for Governor

P.O. Box 3121
Glen Allen, VA 23058
United States

name: Escalation
subject: MAGA deploying nukes in obscure local court race
body:
We are not being facetious when we say that MAGA has just deployed the political equivalent of nuclear weapons in an obscure Pennsylvania judicial race.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c2CjaHV2PxEnsh1G0eW_TrwEp17hC4iJEDWJ5J2cbpY_fHZCayUpfJMLjlh46l_zZ1rId1jbpZqBnjbBAu-6owCSmxWD2KR7J5ElA4TZp55JGxAB8Ur4hGz8kb5_wemq7gkoJxzZPvkL-5uj6GNE_m0nCJi4KkUnDnhGGB8WK_qPcPUqGYVtpNm_KDKtpYBGMYa1Hcc80NXIOtyx_VpAIm-tjw-z3D1eSzXdLjUIm9o=&c=OSRZIgivstUDm2BcxfPUy_8ViIJnemwS0b1TghLahQEQDm9HKmVqCg==&ch=bUkPgJfv9Pfy2QateHZ_j401E2T3CJ1tQUO0ozoW4DLtFfeeZJehiw==)
---
| Peter,
We are not being facetious when we say that MAGA has just deployed the political equivalent of nuclear weapons in an obscure Pennsylvania judicial race.
The race is the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election and the Republican State Leadership Committee just announced an unprecedented get out the vote program titled "Project Doorstrike" that will flood Pennsylvania with Republican ads, canvassers, and dark money.
This is on top of the $30 million they are already planning to spend here and it's not outside of the realm of possibility that Republican spending reaches into the hundreds of millions. They are treating this like a presidential election. Why?
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c2CjaHV2PxEnsh1G0eW_TrwEp17hC4iJEDWJ5J2cbpY_fHZCayUpfJMLjlh46l_zZ1rId1jbpZqBnjbBAu-6owCSmxWD2KR7J5ElA4TZp55JGxAB8Ur4hGz8kb5_wemq7gkoJxzZPvkL-5uj6GNE_m0nCJi4KkUnDnhGGB8WK_qPcPUqGYVtpNm_KDKtpYBGMYa1Hcc80NXIOtyx_VpAIm6Ivt4TbfTtaqks9Tf8ugw=&c=OSRZIgivstUDm2BcxfPUy_8ViIJnemwS0b1TghLahQEQDm9HKmVqCg==&ch=bUkPgJfv9Pfy2QateHZ_j401E2T3CJ1tQUO0ozoW4DLtFfeeZJehiw==)

| | | |
The GOP is deploying the nukes to this race because if they can pull off a win and remove the Democratic majority from the PA supreme court they can kill the Democratic party and their ability to wield power as we know it.
MAGA seizing this court means:

* They will unleash unprecedented voter suppression that will deliver PA and their 19 electoral college votes to Trump in 2028 when he seeks a third term.

* All Democratic congressional seats in PA can be removed via redistricting bolstering the GOP House Majority by a total of 18 red seats from PA.

If they win here, Democrats never win a Presidential election again. Simple as that.
This is why they are going nuclear. All the while, Democrats including those in Washington are barely paying any attention to this race. We are ASLEEP at the wheel.
We need a nuclear counter of our own to salvage this race and Defend our Courts aims to provide it. We are one of the only organizations engaged in this race from the Democratic side and we are quarterbacking the Democratic defense here.
[We are canvassing, running digital ads, and soon we'll be up on tv, but we are still massively outgunned here and only 54 days remain until E-day. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 so we can immediately get it to work in the field to expedite our comeback?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c2CjaHV2PxEnsh1G0eW_TrwEp17hC4iJEDWJ5J2cbpY_fHZCayUpfJMLjlh46l_z1C9MfFp7EqUGwPs5GbZHqZ2gkQHaeSN-BY3pQdjIe_qunRNUX48f0IpHvJQ1P7QAn8xXX3_joM-9QoauWu4DvyWxkePqbE3q7ZmUd-qItN8YP071FTKnoMD28JTO53gy7nbmclj9Rwno4GuvvGdj5exp2AhDS_OtMrYKUHhhs2-Ae0VSMi15DA==&c=OSRZIgivstUDm2BcxfPUy_8ViIJnemwS0b1TghLahQEQDm9HKmVqCg==&ch=bUkPgJfv9Pfy2QateHZ_j401E2T3CJ1tQUO0ozoW4DLtFfeeZJehiw==)

Charlie Kirk was tragically killed yesterday. His voice may be gone, but his message lives on. He stood boldly for truth, faith, and freedom--now it's our turn. You and I must carry the torch and refuse to back down. Stand strong. Speak out. Live with conviction. name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: My police officer husband is facing wrongful murder charges
body:
We’ve been so strong and hopeful but tonight, this little device on my husband’s ankle broke me.

| | | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom.
---
| | Dear Friend,I’m so sad and angry right now. After over a decade of service to his country, my police officer husband is facing politically motivated prosecution while saving the life of an innocent person.We’ve been so strong and hopeful but tonight, this little device on my husband’s ankle broke me.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3qpo04ttip4m4n1dqoa8k2641s5qsq3nfbbfrb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi69p72cth2bs)
---
I'm sorry for getting ahead of myself, but it’s been so hard, and I don’t know what else to do as a Soros-backed prosecutor is persecuting my husband for saving the life of a fellow officer. [**Friend, will you help my husband get his life back?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztdoerqttp1g2jd5vbbne5qljtdvpnul089sk6h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi69p72cth2bs) It all started when Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, responded to a shoplifting call. The suspect’s resistance quickly turned into a violent attack on the officers – putting Brad’s partner's life at risk.Brad did the only thing a good officer could do and shot the violent criminal.It's episodes like this that make me worried to death when Brad is late coming home. I cried myself sick when I heard what happened that day, but I was so thankful they were alive.And yet I know the danger our families and communities would be in if Brad and other good officers weren't willing to risk their lives.That’s why I was completely shocked when we heard Brad was being charged with murder! But then we found out the prosecutor was New Mexico’s radical Soros-backed Attorney General Raul Torrez, who used to work in the Obama administration.**This isn’t about justice – this is a political attack.** Friend, it only got worse from there.In February, Brad was wrongly convicted at a circus trial. Not only were two jurors removed and replaced without reason, but one of the jurors they kept was a radical BLM activist who hid their bias during jury selection!Honestly, I don’t know how we would’ve faced the attacks from the anti-cop mob if it wasn’t for Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). When LELDF heard about Brad’s fight for justice, they reached out and offered to help fund his legal defense.I thank God every day for bringing us hope in such a dark time.But friend, LELDF is a non-profit organization so the only way they can help good officers under attack, like Brad, is through the support of patriots like you. [**Which is why I must ask...will you make an emergency gift to LELDF, so Brad has the necessary funds to win this fight?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsvm6km0phbqtbta3nj06u5ngqkg7cq0oa63k678_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi69p72cth2bs) Right now, Brad must wait, shackled to an ankle monitor, until the judge decides on **September 19th** if he gets a chance at a fair trial...which would be another hefty sum. Don’t get me wrong, I’m so grateful Brad is home and no longer sitting in prison, but dealing with his ankle monitor has been tough; the kids begging Dad to go swimming with them, the awkward stares in public, seeing him struggle with it to work out or do other activities... The other day, Brad walked to the back of our property to make sure one of the dog's bowls had water and to fill up the hummingbird feeders...then he gets a call from SCRAM, the people that monitor his ankle monitor, saying he is out of boundaries.OUR. OWN. PROPERTY?!?It really got to him and seeing him upset breaks my heart. All of the crap he has gone through, that our family has gone through, and will continue to deal with for who knows how long...All because one lowlife criminal chose to put two officers in danger.Because one corrupt politician decided he needed political gain.I can’t let them ruin our lives...but I know I can’t win this for him on my own.**[Please, if you are able, send your best possible donation to LELDF to help Brad win this battle before it’s too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfu7ucdl5l8nkllk1a49mfmv1klqua0tin6vst2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi69p72cth2bs)** Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for all of the love and support. You all have no idea how much it means to us.Thank you, thank you, thank you!Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. My husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, is waiting for a judge to grant him a new trial after a BLM activist infiltrated the jury at his trial in February. This political prosecution from a Soros-backed Attorney General has been a heavy burden on our family. **[Please, if you are able, donate $35 or more to LELDF as they help fund Brad’s legal defense.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdgbmicl2k358vdquuinukd6thqelpatr9mv8c2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi69p72cth2bs)** Thank you for your prayers and financial support!
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj5rsm6msmvpjd1l9gpb40gccm0r9g5j2j8rgf60_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdi69p72cth2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---

|

---

| | I am still reeling—shocked, stunned, and incredibly saddened by the assassination of my friend, and the friend of so many, Charlie Kirk. Charlie wasn’t afraid. He lived a consequential life because he wasn’t afraid to talk about the things that matter most. I was privileged to know Charlie for over 10 years, and if there’s one thing Charlie wanted everybody to know, it’s that his life was anchored by his personal and saving faith in Jesus Christ.
---
| | [| | |
---|---|---](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/SWlBKLYoeQJY7XKdlelqD2J3orKyHQHXKkalloknpPRAsaY8yziSK_ea_QkGCYSRhhcj-p56kpIroWblGWDdQXhvllIubZz_R4N1ypp8wRD9tFgS6wmSO4lIIrX8khmbVwhfFUAjPJkRkkKyzSDBRcm4BDyTjA2tAHdTV5h3gVD7DhcpBtZk5i5vFXgcKt1yz562MpVYx2oYza5avezrC1ds-KDLo6QCj5JHmsDOfF7vpTSpuA_N2464CXuWAndYT1NB8k-HLX-tIfe3-OUQiD2Nva3gYWP8EHEo7F6gAWmS_g_Y24azmWd4G1leQDFp4EfI4_a1qVelzfVuOqsimO83Lg-fkjhAXmibLU6j6SOANyQVh3lZawmgWZcOrsdwEshn9R7vpCYjQyhBghqAEyh6FlL6d9dneY6ASq9wsWgIDomQ7Q/uP3fjhBQA2noxdYAC2iMX-t7cqtinW-6/12 "Charlie Kirk Is A Modern Day Patriot Who Died For This Country")
Here’s the sad truth: the reason the Left hated Charlie so much is that he confronted them with facts and with good cheer. He was a happy man, happily married with beautiful children. That is what the legacy of his life will be. _Weeping may tarry for the night, but joy comes with the morning._ —Psalm 30:5
---
| | In Liberty,
---
---
Josh Hawley

name: Aditya Pai from pai's politics
subject: A prayer for Charlie Kirk and the country he loved
body:
Let's hope America uses this moment to maybe, just maybe, grow the F up.

| |

# [A prayer for Charlie Kirk and the country he loved](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=173345647&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMzQ1NjQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTc2MDU4NjMsImV4cCI6MTc2MDE5Nzg2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.2_wQZfnjgbErVzW356q1h1JlscAICCq-Nu_fAw9WmkY)
### Let's hope America uses this moment to maybe, just maybe, grow the F up.
| | [Aditya Pai](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---
| Sep 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---

---

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paipolitics/p/a-prayer-for-charlie-kirk-and-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e91308d4-830c-4174-b25a-59dc5f1a2273?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_Charlie Kirk, wife Erika, and their two children (Us Weekly; Instagram/charliekirk1776)._
My thoughts are with Erika Kirk, Charlie's widow, his 3-year-old daughter, and his 1-year-old son, who must now go on without their father. Nothing is more important than taking a moment to be present, spiritually and emotionally, to what they are going through now, which few people can imagine. I certainly cannot.
As horrific as this crime is, the response on both sides of the aisle has been, in some ways, more disturbing. The basic lack of humanity frightens me. And the political recriminations are embarrassing, childish, and somewhat pathetic, actually.
Yesterday was not our finest hour as Americans. We look like fools. Perhaps we are foolish; _OK._ That makes it all the more important to at least not _look like_ idiots. We're in two wars, at least, a trade war, a debt crisis, an AI arms race, etc., and all news is global.
### **Judge not**
The rush to judgment and commentary is just premature, for at least 3 reasons:
* _First_ , we do not know who murdered Charlie or why. It is possible that he was killed for his political views and partisan affiliation, and maybe even probable. I don't know that, though. Neither does anyone else. I wish we would all take a deep breath, D's and R's, and just stop talking. A day of silence -- one single day -- where _no one_ is allowed to talk politics, would do this country a lot of good.
* _Second,_ as of this writing, the assassin is at large. That poses acute danger of further political violence. And if not apprehended at all, that threat becomes indefinite, inchoate, and ominous -- a dark cloud hanging over our politics. This would be a very bad outcome. Whatever energy we have, then, should be invested not in attacking the other side, but in apprehending the killer, ensuring that person gets a fair trial, and holding them accountable so that others are not tempted to attempt the same.
* _Third,_ based on what is already known about the shooting, the killer seems pretty skilled, careful, calculating, sophisticated. This appears premeditated. Talented amateur? Professional? He climbed on top of a roof ~200 yards out, dressed in all black, barely detected, and delivered a devastatingly accurate shot -- one bullet -- straight to the victim's neck. He disappeared almost immediately. And he has not yet been caught.
* Someone competent enough to get this far almost certainly thought through the political consequences.
* He had to have known, I think, that this would enrage the right, provoke reactions from the left, and possibly lead to retaliation or copycat violence.
* If he knew this, and pulled the trigger anyway, that means he willed this toxic result on our already poisonous discourse.
* _Why?_
* I can think of at least two possibilities:
* **Possibility #1:** the conventional wisdom and rush to judgment is correct, and the assassin really is a mentally unstable and/or misguided leftist who killed Kirk simply because he did not like what he had to say. Politics and partisanship, plain and simple.
* Kirk was on the first stop of a national tour of college campuses, that schedule was [public](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0cbfd230-16eb-4cae-ad9c-22e1ccf8590a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and his killer was clearly following it. So maybe this was just opportunistic: violence to harm the right, or Trump, or Vance, or Kirk, committed by a leftist/anti-Trumper who despised what they stand for.
* **Possibility #2** : the killer really had nothing against Kirk. But on the eve of 9/11, one of those rare days Americans feel patriotic and somewhat unified, this is quite a perfect way to sow chaos, anarchy, and division. A thrilling victory for America's enemies, foreign and domestic.

### **Master debaters vs. people who like to masturbate**
Let's not hate Republicans so hard that we forget who our real enemies are, and the very real harm they wish for us.
Whatever you thought of his views, Charlie Kirk was immensely _productive_ , one of the good guys, a family man with a good heart and good intentions.
I agreed with Charlie on many things, disagreed with him on many others, and never had the good fortune of knowing him personally. He was such an extraordinary force in public life that I felt like I did. He loved our country and wanted to make it better, especially for young people, and especially through public discourse, voting, and competitive debate.
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f02db1c2-4920-4ca9-952d-149647eb6263?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That's why Governor Newsom, to his great credit, had him on the very first episode of his podcast.
Progressives, to their great discredit, [gave him hell for it.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/410ea27f-e39b-4ceb-95de-8c2d1a7a2e27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **Liberals who want to win vs. illiberal losers**
As a high school debater and lawyer, it would be very difficult for me to think someone who loves to argue and tries to persuade is _The Problem._
The problem is that too many Americans, especially young people, want to shut down conversations altogether. Indeed, even here, [they tried to do just that.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0ee10bf9-5a70-412d-8002-68add2add8f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) For them, every political issue is a moral issue, having bad politics means you're a bad person, and their tribe has a monopoly on righteousness, justice, wisdom, and truth.
This is some truly epic bullshit. And most voters know it.
Democrats: catch up. The fight we need in the party is not between socialists and centrists, or populists and the establishment. The real fight is between liberals of _all_ policy persuasions, on the one hand, and illiberal progressives who are allergic to intellectual growth and believe they have a constitutional right to never be offended.
### **Enemies foreign and domestic**
Charlie was imperfect in heated conversation, and sometimes fell short of his own high standards, as we _all_ fall short sometimes. He said some things I wish he hadn't, or said them differently than I wish he had said them.
But he didn't deserve to suffer for speaking. He did not deserve to have his character assassinated, well before he was killed in flesh and blood. No one does.
Why not?
Well, as always, it's pretty hard to improve on Lincoln:
> _" We are not enemies, but friends. We must not be enemies. Though passion may have strained it must not break our bonds of affection. The mystic chords of memory, stretching from every battlefield and patriot grave to every living heart and hearthstone all over this broad land, will yet swell the chorus of the Union, when again touched, as surely they will be, by the better angels of our nature."_1
Let's not forget who our real enemies are, foreign and domestic.2
Charlie Kirk was absolutely not one of them.
1
First Inaugural Address of Abraham Lincoln, Mon., March 4, 1861.
2
A phrase from the United States [oath](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/644aeb99-911c-48de-a8ee-e15cf8eb6d1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of federal office, and, more importantly, _The West Wing_ , [Season 3, Episode 19](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0586a8d0-414f-4a76-a0da-88f4dc268f75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Derrick Van Orden just screwed over WI-03
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Derrick Van Orden spent months claiming he would protect rural health access, and he lied right to our faces.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e57b29f-019d-49f6-a936-4bbc4e4108ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Derrick Van Orden voted to screw over our district, Peter. Because of his vote to give billionaires another tax break, WI-03 is about to have: ❌ 32,669 folks lose healthcare ❌ 34,393 families losing food assistance ❌ 1,808 energy jobs wiped out ❌And at least one rural hospital at risk of closure It’s sick. Derrick Van Orden spent months claiming he would protect rural health access, and he lied right to our faces. Call me crazy, but I believe every Wisconsin life is valuable regardless of your income, and that we need our country to work for the people who actually keep it running. WI-03 was one of the closest races in 2024. Now, voters can clearly see how Van Orden stands – with party bosses and elites, NOT with us. And together, we can finish the job and bring our district back to the working folks. [If you’re as mad as I am, rush a $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to flip Congress so DC can actually work for working people again.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td90e968e-b961-45e0-af33-60474aed57c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates.
