We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

# Hello Capitalists,
### **With a heavy heart at the loss of a great patriot and champion of American capitalism, here is everything you should be following today:**
* FBI releases suspect photos
* Trump honors Kirk after shock killing
* Manhunt closes in on Kirk suspect as message leaks
* Ackerman and Portnoy lead tributes to Kirk

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: 45475.30 ( ⬇️0.52%) - 🔴**
* **S &P: 6538.81 (⬆️0.40%) - ✅**
* **NASDAQ: 21941.33 ( ⬆️0.28%) - ✅**
* **CBOE VIX Volatility Index: $15.10 ( ⬆️0.33%) - ⚠️⬆️**

* * *
* * *
# BREAKING UPDATE: FBI releases photos of person of interest
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0760e294-3b89-4dfa-84fd-fba76f051fd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
* * *
# Trump hails Kirk as a likely future president and orders flags flown at half mast
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7136c41c-3b51-4448-9f8f-cac176f8dbfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump appeared on CNBC to declare **["the country will heal"](https://substack.com/redirect/7136c41c-3b51-4448-9f8f-cac176f8dbfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** After Conservative activist Charlie Kirk was fatally shot while speaking at Utah Valley University, Wednesday afternoon. He has ordered U.S. flags lowered to half-staff in Kirk's honor.
* **Trump Hails Kirk's Influence:** Praising Kirk as instrumental in his 2024 election victory and a potential future president, Trump expressed devastation over losing a key ally with "the heart of the youth."

[](https://substack.com/redirect/302005b2-9439-4ceb-9154-afa87fd54eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Healing Focus Amid Mourning:** Trump emphasized national unity and "winning for the country" in a CNBC interview, while posting heartfelt sympathies to Kirk's wife Erika and family on Truth Social.
* **Thousands Attended Deadly Event** : Kirk was addressing several thousand people when the shocking killing unfolded Wednesday.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f5cf76-86b7-4fcd-ac95-26c0ce1a9ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Elon Musk Dreams, Mode Mobile Delivers](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f5cf76-86b7-4fcd-ac95-26c0ce1a9ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fb474e71-ca94-425e-ade4-928c70a960c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As Elon Musk puts it, "Apple used to really bring out products that would blow people's minds." Those days are long gone, and a new smartphone company is stepping up to deliver the mind-blowing moments we've been missing. **[They've just been granted the stock ticker $MODE](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f5cf76-86b7-4fcd-ac95-26c0ce1a9ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by the Nasdaq, and you can still make an investment in their pre-IPO offering.
Turning smartphones from an expense into an income stream, Mode has already **[helped users earn and save an eye-popping $325M+](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f5cf76-86b7-4fcd-ac95-26c0ce1a9ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f5cf76-86b7-4fcd-ac95-26c0ce1a9ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and seen an astonishing 32,481% revenue growth rate over three years. Uber did it to taxis, Airbnb did it to hotels...And now, Mode Mobile is doing it to the $500 billion smartphone industry.
Their last investment round was over subscribed at $0.30/share and space in the current round is limited.
Don't miss your chance to invest in the next big disruption to smartphones. **[Join 55,000+ shareholders and invest today.](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f5cf76-86b7-4fcd-ac95-26c0ce1a9ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f5cf76-86b7-4fcd-ac95-26c0ce1a9ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Manhunt for Kirk's killer picks up the pace as internal message leaks
The manhunt to **[apprehend the assassin](https://substack.com/redirect/cb105c38-a02d-4e2b-af0a-0a9c1353251e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of Conservative activist Charlie Kirk is intensifying as President Trump hailed him as a "truly Great American Patriot."
### BREAKING UPDATE: FBI releases photos of person of interest
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0760e294-3b89-4dfa-84fd-fba76f051fd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Shooter Hunt Intensifies Nationwide:** Authorities recovered the rifle, a footprint, palm print, and clear video footage of the college-aged suspect, who remains at large after the Wednesday attack.
* **[The WSJ has confirmed](https://substack.com/redirect/bc0d010f-9655-40bb-89c5-136b7a54f8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that the recovered weapon was "engraved with transgender and antifascist ideology."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/da4a665c-f611-41eb-9f25-778972466560?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Internal Message leaked:** Conservative podcaster Steven Crowder released a screenshot showing internal communications from the investigation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/018f962b-4b52-44c5-972d-7abe4b50d7a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**"On September 10, 2025, at approximately 12:24PM, Conservative political influencer Charlie Kirk was shot and killed at the Utah Valley University in Orem, UT. Mr. Kirk was speaking at the University as part of the American Comeback Tour. Multiple SLC I and III agents responded immediately. The suspect fired one shot from an elevated position on a rooftop in an adjacent building on the campus and surveillance video shows the suspect, jumping off and fleeing the area on foot. ATF and other law-enforcement located an older model imported Mauser .30-06 caliber bolt action rifle wrapped in a towel in a wooded area near the campus. The location of the firearm appears to match the suspects route of travel. The spent cartridge was still chambered in addition to three unspent rounds at the top fed magazine. All cartridges have engraved wording on them, expressing transgender and anti-fascist ideology. An emergency trace has been submitted an ATF SLC is working leads generated by the trace. The firearm and ammunition have been taken by the FBI for DNA analysis and fingerprint impressions. Upon completion of forensics, the firearm will be disassembled for additional importer information. Multiple people of interest having contacted or detained because of eyewitness testimony and review of video footage. The primary suspect is yet to be identified. ATF is assisting the investigation with multiple other federal, state, and local partners and the case is co-led by the FBI and Utah SBI.""**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/018f962b-4b52-44c5-972d-7abe4b50d7a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Press Briefing** : Authorities from FBI and Utah police **[held a 9 a.m. ET update](https://substack.com/redirect/da4a665c-f611-41eb-9f25-778972466560?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on the ongoing shooter search where they confirmed that they have secured the weapon that killed Kirk, a footprint, palm print, and clear video footage of the college-aged suspect.

* **Fatal Neck Wound Confirmed** : The gunman struck Kirk once in the neck from a campus building 200 yards away.
* **Detainees Released Without Charges** : Two persons of interest were briefly held but cleared after investigations showed no links to the assassination as investigators focus on evidence from the Orem campus event.,

* * *
* * *
# Wall Street Titans mourn Kirk as "a giant of a man"
Business titans have **[expressed their shock and condolences](https://substack.com/redirect/bf27cf4d-3972-4159-b62d-02af6653a3e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk was killed, hailing him as a patriot and visionary.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf27cf4d-3972-4159-b62d-02af6653a3e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Ackman Honors Personal Encounter:** Pershing Square CEO Bill Ackman felt privileged to have spent time with Kirk, describing the 31-year-old as "a giant of a man" whose impact was profound.
* **Sacks Laments Lost Patriot:** Venture capitalist David Sacks depicted Kirk as a self-made man, young husband, father, and relentless optimist, urging prayers for his family amid the tragedy.
* **Portnoy Condemns National Darkness:** Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy viewed the shooting as one of America's darkest days, stressing it transcends politics and signals deeper societal issues.
* **Trump Extols Youth Advocate:** President Donald Trump praised Kirk's unmatched connection to America's youth, calling him "Great, and even Legendary," while offering love and sympathies to his wife Erika and family.
## [Charlie Kirk reveals how he got rich: "Bet on America!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/eaf90037-c6ab-4c73-a973-7d130fb5d2a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

BREAKING UPDATE: FBI releases photos of person of interest | | ---|---|--- Shooter Hunt Intensifies Nationwide: Authorities recovered the rifle, a footprint, palm print, and clear video footage of the college-aged suspect, who remains at large after the Wednesday attack. that the recovered weapon was "engraved with transgender and antifascist ideology." | | ---|---|--- Internal Message leaked: Conservative podcaster Steven Crowder released a screenshot showing internal communications from the investigation. | | ---|---|--- "On September 10, 2025, at approximately 12:24PM, Conservative political influencer Charlie Kirk was shot and killed at the Utah Valley University in Orem, UT. Mr. Kirk was speaking at the University as part of the American Comeback Tour. Multiple SLC I and III agents responded immediately. The suspect fired one shot from an elevated position on a rooftop in an adjacent building on the campus and surveillance video shows the suspect, jumping off and fleeing the area on foot. ATF and other law-enforcement located an older model imported Mauser .30-06 caliber bolt action rifle wrapped in a towel in a wooded area near the campus. The location of the firearm appears to match the suspects route of travel. The spent cartridge was still chambered in addition to three unspent rounds at the top fed magazine. All cartridges have engraved wording on them, expressing transgender and anti-fascist ideology. An emergency trace has been submitted an ATF SLC is working leads generated by the trace. The firearm and ammunition have been taken by the FBI for DNA analysis and fingerprint impressions. Upon completion of forensics, the firearm will be disassembled for additional importer information. Multiple people of interest having contacted or detained because of eyewitness testimony and review of video footage. The primary suspect is yet to be identified. ATF is assisting the investigation with multiple other federal, state, and local partners and the case is co-led by the FBI and Utah SBI."" | | ---|---|--- Press Briefing : Authorities from FBI and Utah police on the ongoing shooter search where they confirmed that they have secured the weapon that killed Kirk, a footprint, palm print, and clear video footage of the college-aged suspect. Fatal Neck Wound Confirmed : The gunman struck Kirk once in the neck from a campus building 200 yards away. Detainees Released Without Charges : Two persons of interest were briefly held but cleared after investigations showed no links to the assassination as investigators focus on evidence from the Orem campus event., Wall Street Titans mourn Kirk as "a giant of a man" Business titans have after Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk was killed, hailing him as a patriot and visionary. | | ---|---|--- Ackman Honors Personal Encounter: Pershing Square CEO Bill Ackman felt privileged to have spent time with Kirk, describing the 31-year-old as "a giant of a man" whose impact was profound. Sacks Laments Lost Patriot: Venture capitalist David Sacks depicted Kirk as a self-made man, young husband, father, and relentless optimist, urging prayers for his family amid the tragedy. Portnoy Condemns National Darkness: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy viewed the shooting as one of America's darkest days, stressing it transcends politics and signals deeper societal issues. Trump Extols Youth Advocate: President Donald Trump praised Kirk's unmatched connection to America's youth, calling him "Great, and even Legendary," while offering love and sympathies to his wife Erika and family. | | | | ---|---|--- | Jul 23 | The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication. body:

And their outdated retail model, and outrageous pricing game has largely stayed the same -- and gone on for too long consumers say. Especially in tough economic times, people no longer can, or want, to pay $5,000 to $10,000 for hearing aids that you can get for $100 -- offering the same crisp, clear hearing, and even wireless charging. Not to mention, traditional, old fashioned hearing aid companies require customers to make an appointment to visit a hearing aid retail center in order to get what they need at sky high prices. But now, one company has disrupted the hearing aid industry and ushered in a New Era of Hearing Aids with a way to get high-quality hearing aids with NO visit, and without spending thousands of dollars. That way, they never run out of sound and avoid "battery life anxiety." name: Tom Fitton
subject: Remember When?
body:
Do you remember your first Election Day? I remember mine like it was yesterday. I must have been six or seven, hanging out with my neighborhood friend at our local school where our parents were working the polls. I didn’t know exactly what was going on at the time, but I somehow knew, almost intuitively, that it was important... that this day mattered.

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Do you remember your first Election Day? I remember mine like it was yesterday.
I must have been six or seven, hanging out with my neighborhood friend at our local school where our parents were working the polls. I didn't know exactly what was going on at the time, but I somehow knew, almost intuitively, that it was important... that this day mattered.
That was the America you and I knew. A country where the people chose their leaders on one special day, **Election Day**. _One day_. _One vote_. _One nation_.
AAs an informed conservative, you know how radical partisans, activist lawyers, and crooked officials have attempted to dismantle Election Day (and the security it provides) by turning it into Election Week or even _Election Month_.
That's why I'm thrilled to report back on how Judicial Watch's team is fighting for the integrity of Election Day. **Thanks to your steadfast support** , we have **three active lawsuits** (all critical and historic) challenging state laws that "extend" Election Day...and open the door to voter fraud.

* **Mississippi

**
We recently filed a brief to the **U.S. Supreme Court** opposing Mississippi's attempt to overturn the **U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit 's** decision which struck down a state law allowing ballots received up to five days after Election Day to be counted. We won a solid victory at the appeals court, and we are very hopeful the High Court will decline to hear Mississippi's senseless attempt to overturn that decision!

* **Illinois

**
Our legal team is working overtime to prepare for our historic appearance before the **U.S. Supreme Court** on October 8th on behalf of our clients' (who include **Congressman Michael Bost, R-IL**) standing to challenge a state law that extends Election Day by a whopping 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

* **California**

Our lawsuit on behalf of **Congressman Darrell Issa (R-CA)** , which challenges the state law permitting ballots received up to seven days after Election Day, continues to work its way through the **U.S. District Court for Northern California.**

**Counting ballots received after Election Day is a flagrant violation of federal law and encourages fraud and voter distrust.**
While lots of organizations talk a good game about election integrity, Judicial Watch is the one organization fighting effectively to overturn these reckless state laws!
There's no one else capable or willing to do the long hard work Judicial Watch does when it comes to safeguarding our elections. [**That 's why your financial support is vital to our succes.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76556&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
Your support today will help us continue the fight by providing us with the resources we need to hire the best team of election law lawyers in the country, and dig in for the long haul to work through the legal system and the courts for ballot integrity and honest elections.
We have come a long way...and with your help now, we can do even more to protect our elections!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President
| [YOUR SUPPORT WILL HELP MAKE EVEN MORE VICTORIES FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY POSSIBLE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76556&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Do you have a clean energy story, Peter?
body:
Hi Peter,
Just reaching out again in case you missed your chance to tell your clean energy story! If you have any experience with home energy efficiency or clean energy upgrades (including any challenges), please share your story to help other folks looking to make these same changes. [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=30Rmc1vgDGdCctV1cNcynaaoqNK+JEAY/VtbZzOV15mRhcbLyPYyHhsS2ZctubviTa5kdKqNfZCjEf5/WeIfKre0aBq6XnlDQrUYB5EH7nDPOAZYnb47pI1n9PSfPRiE] These stories will be also used to address the impacts climate policies have on Oregonians.
Share your story [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=30Rmc1vgDGdCctV1cNcynaaoqNK+JEAY/VtbZzOV15mRhcbLyPYyHhsS2ZctubviTa5kdKqNfZCjEf5/WeIfKre0aBq6XnlDQrUYB5EH7nDPOAZYnb47pI1n9PSfPRiE]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=30Rmc1vgDGdCctV1cNcynaaoqNK+JEAY/VtbZzOV15mRhcbLyPYyHhsS2ZctubviTa5kdKqNfZCjEf5/WeIfKre0aBq6XnlDQrUYB5EH7nDPOAZYnb47pI1n9PSfPRiE [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=30Rmc1vgDGdCctV1cNcynaaoqNK+JEAY/VtbZzOV15mRhcbLyPYyHhsS2ZctubviTa5kdKqNfZCjEf5/WeIfKre0aBq6XnlDQrUYB5EH7nDPOAZYnb47pI1n9PSfPRiE]
Hi Peter,
Hot enough for you? For most of us Oregonians, several days in a row near or over 100° are unusual and maybe unbearable. If you're one of the fortunate people with cooling at home or work, extreme heat may be an inconvenience for now. Too many folks in Oregon still don’t have cooling at home. Outdoor workers need to cool down at night and often can’t afford to miss a day. That’s dangerous for health and safety.
Do the recent heat waves have you thinking of replacing your old A/C or installing cooling for the first time? To lower utility bills, cut pollution, and increase health and safety, we need to get more homes and buildings using energy efficient heat pumps, which work as A/C in the summer and a heater in the winter!
It’s never a bad time to get a heat pump, but it’s no small undertaking. Major shifts are coming for incentives, which help lower the cost to buy and install heat pumps and other energy saving measures.
Here’s what you need to know:
* Pres. Trump and a Republican-led Congress are raising the cost to you or your landlord to pay to upgrade your home for safety and resilience, by taking away tax breaks and other incentives. While Oregonians will still have programs to help pay for projects in years to come, the federal tax breaks for heat pumps will go away by December 31, 2025. Here’s an easy to understand guide on what’s changing, from Rewiring America [https://homes.rewiringamerica.org/electric-tax-credits] .
* Oregon lawmakers failed to reinvest in two state programs that would help people pay for a heat pump this year. We’ll continue to demand they step up as the feds fail us.
* After the federal tax breaks are taken away from us this year, there will be help to pay for your project in 2026 and beyond! Many electric utilities, the Energy Trust of Oregon, and local programs like the Portland Clean Energy Fund will continue to offer rebates, incentives, and other ways to discount a new heat pump.
* Oregon Dept. of Energy (ODOE) will have limited incentive programs next year [https://www.oregon.gov/energy/Incentives/Pages/home-energy-rebates.aspx] for energy efficiency and heat pump projects. And the Heat Pump Purchase Program [https://www.oregon.gov/energy/Incentives/Pages/HP3.aspx] is still available for landlords and new construction. Another round of incentives for homeowners will be available in 2027.
Two important points about all this:
1. If you’ve been thinking about a heat pump or your air conditioning or furnace is on its last legs, then it might be time to act before the tax credits are stripped away. Consumer experts say no one should rush to start a heat pump project at home, if they’re not ready. Putting too much pressure on yourself is not a good way to decide on a major investment.
2. We’ll continue to fight alongside you to convince people in power to make it easier to afford and install heat pumps, increase resilience, and lower energy bills in our homes and buildings.
No matter when you make the decision on upgrades to be cleaner, energy efficient and healthier, make sure to check out the Energy Hub for Incentive Programs + Projects in Oregon (HIPPO) [https://incentives.oregon.gov/] . It will help you find all the incentives available to you for all kinds of clean energy and climate resilience projects.
If you’ve undergone your own home energy efficiency or clean energy upgrades (or challenges), will you take a moment to tell us your story here? [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2] Your story can help other people who are looking to make changes and help us spread the word about using these incentives before they expire! They also help illustrate the human impact climate policies have on the lives of Oregonians.
Share your story [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=30Rmc1vgDGdCctV1cNcynaaoqNK+JEAY/VtbZzOV15mRhcbLyPYyHhsS2ZctubviTa5kdKqNfZCjEf5/WeIfKre0aBq6XnlDQrUYB5EH7nDPOAZYnb47pI1n9PSfPRiE]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Jena Griswold
subject: A solemn day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter –
Today marks 24 years since September 11, 2001.
As we pause to remember this day, I want to send my deepest support to all the families and friends who lost loved ones in the attack. We will never forget the courage of our first responders and the countless heroes who ran toward danger to save lives.
We hold those we lost in our hearts, and their memories will always be a blessing.
This anniversary reminds us not only of the tragedy but also of the resilience, unity, and compassion that carried us forward. As we reflect, let us recommit ourselves to building a stronger, more united future.
— Jena
Follow Jena Online:

| | | | Hi Peter, I just released my first ad, and I want you to be among the first to see it. Well, I’m not here for stunts. I’m here to get behind the wheel and actually clean up the mess in Washington – corruption, excuses, and politicians more interested in headlines than real work. I know what real work looks like. I grew up in a working family and started up small businesses in Tennessee. When something’s broken, you don’t wait around and complain. You fix it. That’s why in my first ad, you’ll see me hard at work in my dump truck– because it’s time to haul out the corruption, the extremism, and the gridlock that’s holding American families back. Washington politicians aren’t going to clean up their own mess. name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsd3vvrdkff1kd7cbhet64f3m6c2sgbo31go43ho_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdh6cpb1c1h2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkvgg675igae3f7vmn287l0oh6luf2j9ghi8m0fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdh6cpb1c1h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvi34peq88bju5popg133tstlliredrprtgpb6l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdh6cpb1c1h2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh3fo5l1e0kst42saso1l9fgtetul2no5id7e0jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdh6cpb1c1h2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm915pd8g0cgqspad4og4j5mg5t62d54ar2g9mj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cdh6cpb1c1h2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The NY Times Called... This Could Be A Turning Point
body:
Yesterday, after Charlie Kirk was pronounced dead, the New York Times called me to ask what I was feeling and thought. To my surprise when the articl
| | |
---
Yesterday, after **Charlie Kirk** was pronounced dead, the **New York Times** called me to ask what I was feeling and thought. To my surprise when the article was released today, the **NY Times** actually gave great honor to **Charlie Kirk** rather than disparaging him like I assumed they would.
---
|
---
I am praying that Charlie's death will not be in vain but will really mark a _Turning Point_ in the United States for good.
**Could this be a moment where we all come together?**
I want to share something with you that was forwarded to me that I think will bless you.
"The Cross Still Offends
The bullet tore the air in half.
A folding chair rattled.
A Bible dropped.
A young man slumped sideways beneath a white event tent, eyes wide with the weight of eternity.
It was supposed to be a conversation. A “prove me wrong” segment. But this time, rebuttal came not with words, but with a rifle.
Charlie Kirk didn’t get to finish his sentence.
I got the news just before prayer meeting. I contemplated this death as I prepared to lead the saints in prayer. But I didn’t feel like praying. Not tonight. My hands were still. My mouth was ready. But my soul was pacing. Angry. Grieving. Tempted.
Tempted to grow quiet.
Tempted to sit this one out.
Tempted to wonder if any of this, faith, boldness, public gospel witness, is still worth it.
Because hatred in this country isn’t simmering anymore.
It is boiling.
Europe is trembling.
Israel is burning.
Rockets lit the sky over Gaza again.
And now, here on American soil, the blood of a Christian apologist paints the pavement of a university quad.
What do you do with that?
What do you say when courage gets gunned down in daylight?
Charlie Kirk was no perfect man. None of us are.
But he had backbone where most of us don’t anymore. He was a believer.
Unashamed. Unafraid. He understood that real conversations only happen when truth is welcome at the table. And the truth he carried most was Christ.
He brought the gospel into public space on purpose.
Because the gospel isn’t supposed to stay in church basements and private Bible studies. It is meant to confront. It is supposed to offend. It was not made for safety.
The Word became flesh and they nailed Him to a tree.
So of course they came for Charlie.
Of course they reached for a gun.
This is what evil does when it runs out of arguments. It doesn’t reason. It kills.
That’s the part that catches in my throat. Not just the sadness, but the strategy of hell behind it.
The Enemy wants us afraid.
He wants us to see what happened to Charlie and backpedal.
He wants the rest of us to whisper, to soften the message, to believe the lie that faith should stay private.
But Christ never whispered.
He preached in temples, on hillsides, in courtrooms, at dinner tables.
And when they told Him to be quiet, He picked up His cross.
Not a symbolic one.
A real one.
Heavy. Bloody. Splintered.
When Jesus said, “Follow Me,” He didn’t hand out maps. He handed out crosses.
That’s what I remembered tonight.
I sat in our prayer space, surrounded by saints who had brought prayer lists and worn Bibles.
And I realized I didn’t want to lead them in mourning. I wanted to lead them into battle. Not with banners or fists, but with open Bibles and tear-stained prayers.
The kind of war that kneels in gravel beside the wounded, hands them living water, and refuses to leave. The kind that speaks both mercy and judgment without flinching.
The kind Charlie died for.
This world is not a friend to grace. But grace isn’t fragile.
“Who shall separate us from the love of Christ?”
Paul didn’t leave that question unanswered.
“Shall tribulation, or distress, or persecution, or famine, or nakedness, or danger, or sword?”
—Romans 8:35
He piles up every fear you and I carry and then sets them on fire.
“No. In all these things we are more than conquerors.”
That means bullets don’t win. Slander doesn’t win. Prison bars don’t win. Death doesn’t win.
You can lose everything in this world and still walk into glory with your head lifted high.
Because the love of God in Christ Jesus isn’t suspended by headlines or gunfire.
There are two worlds unfolding right now.
The one you see.
And the one you don’t.
One is filled with chaos. The other is filled with crowns.
I believe that when Charlie Kirk’s body slumped to the concrete, his soul stood upright in heaven. Not limping. Not silenced. Not stunned. But crowned.
He didn’t fall.
He crossed.
The great cloud of witnesses gained another voice.
And I wonder if Stephen met him there.
The first martyr.
The man who got stoned for preaching what the crowd didn’t want to hear.
The man who, in his final breath, saw the heavens open.
The only time in all of Scripture we see Jesus standing at the right hand of God, rising to receive one of His own.
I like to believe He stood again.
Are you afraid?
Do you feel the tremble in your spirit?
Do you wonder if it’s still worth it to speak boldly, to carry your Bible, to preach the gospel in a world that doesn’t just disagree but wants you gone?
You’re not alone.
You’re not weak for feeling that.
But you are called to something stronger than silence.
Don’t let fear become your theology.
The cost is high. But the reward?
The reward is Christ. And He’s not a concept. He’s a King.
Heaven is not empty.
It is filled with scarred saints who refused to bow to fear.
Men who were stoned.
Women who were burned.
Children who sang while the flames climbed.
And every last one of them arrived.
There is no difficulty that can cancel the promise of God.
There is no persecution that can derail your destination.
There is no sniper’s bullet that can separate a soul from Christ.
Your life is not measured by how long you live on earth, but by how much of it was spent pointing to heaven.
Paul said, “I have fought the good fight... I have kept the faith.”
Then he looked toward the reward.
Not a monument. Not a mention in history books.
But a crown.
Handed to him by the One with nail marks still in His hands.
So let me say this clearly.
We do not mourn like the world mourns.
We do not write eulogies dripping with sentiment.
We sing songs of resurrection.
We carry the banner of a Kingdom that does not tremble.
Charlie Kirk did not die for nothing.
He died carrying the same message you and I must now carry forward.
The cross stands tall.
The tomb is still empty.
And the gospel has not lost one ounce of power.
So pick up your cross.
Wipe your eyes.
And keep going.
The crown is worth it.
The King is coming.
And there’s still time to speak.
Even if they shoot.
Lord, give us courage.
And if not safety, give us joy.
For we carry not just the message, but the marks.
And You are worth every bruise."
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
## Churches Are UNDER ATTACK
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24655992.12836.1.49e077c0354d4cf44b908363b79121c6)
---
Right now there is a **MAJOR escalation** of attacks upon Churches in the United States of America. Since 2018 there has been an **increase of over 700%** according to the **Family Research Council**. In 2018 there were 50 reported attacks on churches (**less than 1 per week**). In 2024 there were 415 reported attacks on churches (**more than 1 per day**). I want to **offer two thoughts**. **First to the Pastors** reading this.
Take measures at your church to prevent these attacks. At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24655992.12837.1.60682eea779cfa97b4bbf2ea0d1d9dbc), I am beyond grateful for our security team that watches over the House every service to make sure our people are _SAFE_. But we also partner with local law enforcement every service as well. The police car stationed at the front of our church, I believe, will prevent 99% of bad actors from even attempting something they should not. **We must be as wise as serpents and as harmless as doves.** **Second to Believers** reading this.
Don't you dare stop attending church! God has not given us a spirit of fear but instead one of power, love and a sound mind (**2 Tim 1:7** ). We are told in **Hebrews 10** that as the Day of the Lord gets near that many believers will stop attending church but we are command not to stop gathering together because we need one another. **Do not let the enemy intimidate you from going to the House of the Lord**. Although the stats are _disheartening_ , history proves that whenever the Church is attacked, she always _flourishes_. These attacks will backfire on the enemy and the Church of the Lord Jesus Christ in America will prevail and be even more effective because of them. **Pray for the Body of Christ and the local churches throughout America.** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---

The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24655992.12845.1.a5c8158e0d2b40210d52cf62c9228c8c) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: Attorney General Jason Miyares
subject: We will never forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Today, we honor those we lost and the heroes who ran toward danger.| | | Fellow Virginians, Twenty-four years ago today, our nation faced its darkest hour.

**2,977 innocent lives were taken.** Fathers and mothers, sons and daughters, neighbors and strangers — all united in tragedy, all mourned as family.

But in that darkness, we also witnessed the very best of America.

**First responders who ran toward danger.** Passengers who chose courage over fear. Ordinary citizens who became extraordinary heroes. Communities that came together, regardless of politics, race, or creed.

Today, we remember not just those we lost, but the spirit they embodied — and the unity that carried us through.

As we face challenges in our communities and across our nation, let us honor their memory by choosing to see each other as fellow Americans first. **There is more that unites us than divides us.** Our shared love of country. Our commitment to family. Our belief that tomorrow can be better than today.

That is the America worthy of their memory. That is the America they deserve.

On this solemn anniversary, Virginia stands with all who mourn, all who serve, and all who choose hope over hate.

**We will never forget.**
---
Jason Miyares,Attorney General of Virginia
---

clean_body: Today, we honor those we lost and the heroes who ran toward danger.| | | Fellow Virginians, Twenty-four years ago today, our nation faced its darkest hour. 2,977 innocent lives were taken. Fathers and mothers, sons and daughters, neighbors and strangers — all united in tragedy, all mourned as family. But in that darkness, we also witnessed the very best of America. First responders who ran toward danger. Passengers who chose courage over fear. Ordinary citizens who became extraordinary heroes. Communities that came together, regardless of politics, race, or creed. Today, we remember not just those we lost, but the spirit they embodied — and the unity that carried us through. As we face challenges in our communities and across our nation, let us honor their memory by choosing to see each other as fellow Americans first. There is more that unites us than divides us. Our shared love of country. Our commitment to family. Our belief that tomorrow can be better than today. That is the America worthy of their memory. That is the America they deserve. On this solemn anniversary, Virginia stands with all who mourn, all who serve, and all who choose hope over hate. We will never forget. Jason Miyares,Attorney General of Virginia | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| | Hi Friend, We have some exciting news to share.

Former Congresswoman Katie Porter has consistently shown us that she puts everyday Californians ahead of big money and wealthy donors. That’s exactly why our team is excited to endorse Porter for Governor of California!

But that’s not all. Now, we want you to **hear directly from Porter herself**.

Join us for a special virtual evening where ECU President Tiffany Muller and Porter discuss how we can make **politics accessible to everyone** , as well as share their vision for the future of California and how it impacts campaigns across the country.

The conservative propaganda machine is in overdrive right now, blaming the left for Charlie Kirk's murder yesterday in Utah despite knowing very little about the shooter.
Let me be clear: what happened to Charlie Kirk was horrible. However you or I may feel about the man, political violence is unacceptable--full stop. He didn't deserve that. His kids didn't deserve to lose their father. No one should have to suffer that kind of loss.
But there's a name Republicans are terrified to say right now: **Melissa Hortman**.
Melissa Hortman was a Democratic lawmaker from Minnesota, brutally murdered--alongside her husband and her dog--by a conservative activist just 12 weeks ago. Her name deserves to be said in this moment.
Charlie Kirk's murder is an attack on all Americans. So was Melissa Hortman's.
Every time this kind of political violence surfaces--whether it's the attempted kidnapping of Governor Gretchen Whitmer, the January 6th insurrection, or the hammer attack on Nancy Pelosi's husband--it shakes this country to its core. It causes real trauma. It makes people afraid to run for office, to engage with their communities, to believe in democracy at all.
And here's the uncomfortable truth: the overwhelming majority of these attacks come from the right. That's not partisan spin--it's backed by data. Yes, there are incidents from the left too, and in those moments, we all have a responsibility to look in the mirror and figure out how to move forward and do better.
What we should be doing right now is coming together to condemn political violence across the board. But instead, we've got the President of the United States, conservative influencers, and right-wing media rushing to blame Democrats and "the left"--as if we haven't universally condemned what happened.
They cherry-pick a couple of morons on the internet celebrating Kirk's death and pretend they represent all of us, despite the vast majority of Democrats condemning this violence--including myself, who found out about the shooting live on Newsmax and had to react in real time. Same playbook they used with the dumb Sydney Sweeney jeans ad, or any number of other manufactured moral panics.
It's bullshit. And it needs to be called out for what it is: a desperate grab for cheap political points that pushes us further down the road to a society where violence is normalized.
And it is not normal.
They won't say Melissa Hortman's name because it shatters the narrative they're trying to sell--that the left is violent and the right is peaceful.
That narrative is a lie, and we need to call it out.

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Remembering September 11th and honoring the lives lost and the heroes who emerged.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

Today, we pause to remember the lives lost on September 11, 2001, _and the heroes who stepped forward in that moment of tragedy._

We think of the families who still carry that loss, the first responders who showed true bravery, and the everyday people who helped one another. Their strength and courage remind us of what it means to stand together.

**I hope you'll join me in remembering those we lost and honoring the resilience of the Americans who stepped up to serve their communities and our nation.**

In solidarity,

Wesley

| PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI

PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

body:

name: BREAKING New Jan. 6 Cmte. [VPP]
subject: Our jaws dropped at this Jan 6 news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Signature spot closing! SIGN ASAP >>
| **THE BAD NEWS:** Trump just launched a NEW January 6th Committee in a scheme to undo Democrats’ hard work exposing the truth...

** _But here’s the AMAZING news:_** Hakeem Jeffries just picked INCREDIBLE Dems Eric Swalwell, Jasmine Crockett, and Jared Moskowitz to join the panel! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93841?t=6&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm) [**We need EVERY Democrat reading this to join us and THANK Reps. Swalwell, Crockett, and Moskowitz for FIGHTING BACK »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93841?t=7&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93841?t=8&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm)
---
**To:** Reps. Swalwell, Crockett, and Moskowitz
**From:** A proud Democrat
**Subject:** I stand with you! Dear Reps. Swalwell, Crockett, and Moskowitz,

**CONGRATULATIONS and THANK YOU for joining the new January 6th panel to defend our democracy!**

You’re some of the most outspoken Democrats in Congress, so I can truly think of no one better to take on this challenge.

Please know that I have your backs in this fight. We CAN’T let Trump and his minions ERASE the truth about the deadly January 6th insurrection.

**We know Republicans will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to rewrite history — but with you leading the charge, I know they won’t get away with it.**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93841?t=9&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS CARD AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93841?t=10&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93841?t=11&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm)
Sincerely,
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21190%2E878179%2EA5CUmm)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Spoiler alert: They're right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091125_1&amount=25]
We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.
The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy.
Now Trump, Musk, DOGE, and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.
“ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ”
With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP.
Team, none of this happens without everyone doing their share. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the destruction of our government, save our democracy, and protect the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091125_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091125_1&amount=50]

https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091125_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091125_1&amount=20]

Thanks so much,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Al Franken
subject: Me Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
While some in Washington avoid their constituents, Peggy is front and center, engaging with Minnesotans, hearing their concerns, and bringing people together.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c781319-3581-4caa-9b3c-daacbb9482c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62ad6171-91ae-4e12-a24b-1644f0b6e797/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, When Peggy asked me to reach out to you today, I said, “Of course!” I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom (her, not me), Peggy understands the vital role federal programs play in supporting working families. From Section 8 housing vouchers to health insurance and child care assistance, she knows firsthand how these resources can transform lives. Peggy’s credentials are impressive: currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor, she's the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in our country. Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. She also refuses to take a cent of corporate PAC money, because she won’t be a puppet for corporate interests. While some in Washington avoid their constituents, Peggy is front and center, engaging with Minnesotans, hearing their concerns, and bringing people together. She doesn’t just want to fight Trump and his allies; she’s ready to lead and deliver concrete accomplishments for folks like she’s done in Minnesota over and over again. [Help send my friend Peggy to the Senate by splitting a donation between Blue Amp Action and her campaign now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad39f663-59a3-48b1-8171-f71562607ee8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| There’s no better person to serve Minnesota in the Senate than Peggy. Thanks for supporting her. Al Franken P.S. Peggy told me that if she doesn’t hit her next fundraising goal, I’ll get to email you all again. So if you’re tired of seeing my face in your inbox, [I’d donate right away.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6903461c-7a89-40d1-a501-42cf52a437cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae4e6166-509a-45b0-b557-96df3613e0dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Peters Post
subject: What Scott’s been up to & what’s ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
# [#]This is an exclusive newsletter for Scott’s top supporters to stay up-to-date on the campaign and Scott’s work in Congress. If you want to keep Scott fighting for us in Congress, you can click here to donate! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sp-2509-fr?amount=10]
Peter,
After spending August at home in San Diego, I’m now back in D.C. working to pass a budget and avoid a disastrous shutdown. With only a few weeks until that deadline, I’m keeping my focus on continuing to sound the alarm about our national debt and deficit.
Especially with Trump and the GOP’s Big Ugly Bill set to blow up the national debt by $4 trillion (yes, trillion), the outlook is quickly becoming even more dire. We need commonsense, bipartisan fiscal responsibility more than ever, and rest assured that I’ll continue to lead that work.
Read the full update below for more details about our work so far this year, and make sure to follow the campaign on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/scottpeterssandiego] , X [https://twitter.com/ScottPetersSD] , and Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/scottpetersca50] to stay up-to-date.
I’m looking forward to what the rest of this year will bring. As always, I’m grateful to have your support.
– Scott
# [#]
Epstein Files
With public pressure mounting regarding the release of information regarding Jeffrey Epstein and his associates, Scott is amplifying these demands for transparency. We can’t let the Trump Administration continue to provide evasive answers – the victims deserve justice, and the public deserves answers. Ultimately, this fight is not about politics. It’s about whether survivors finally get the truth and whether the powerful are ever held to the same standard as everyone else.
★ ★ ★
Tijuana River Valley (TRV) Sewage Crisis in the Spotlight
Scott has been working tirelessly to secure the funding needed to address the cross-border sewage crisis that has plagued our region for years. After working alongside the San Diego Congressional delegation to secure $650 million for the International Boundary and Water Commission (IBWC), which is enough to fully repair & expand the South Bay International Wastewater Treatment Plan (SBIWTP), Scott is still working to secure additional funding and long-term solutions to protect our communities’ health. This month, a new study was published showing that the sewage crisis is polluting not just our water, but also our air. [https://timesofsandiego.com/health/2025/08/28/tijuana-river-polluting-air-new-study-finds/] Our community can’t afford any further delay in action.
# [#]
Tackling the Housing Crisis & Supporting Public Transit
It’s no secret that our country is experiencing an affordable housing crisis that impacts nearly every aspect of our lives and the economy, especially here in California. Scott recently reintroduced a bipartisan bill to remedy this problem by facilitating the construction of more housing near transit centers. On top of increased access to affordable homes, this proposed investment in public transportation also serves to cut carbon emissions by growing ridership and getting cars off the road. If we’re going to tackle poverty, boost our economies, and help families everywhere to thrive, we must address housing affordability – and that’s what Scott is doing.
★ ★ ★
Fighting for Transparency
The Big Ugly Bill guts clean energy programs that would save families money and instead gives handouts to Big Oil, sticking hardworking Americans with higher bills. While Republicans prop up outdated, expensive fossil fuels while sabotaging the affordable clean energy future we need, Scott is fighting back. Last week, he led the New Democrats in introducing budget amendments to hold the GOP accountable for their betrayal of working Americans – and Republicans blocked every single one. With another shutdown deadline looming just a few weeks away, Scott isn’t stopping here. He’s continuing to put forward commonsense, bipartisan proposals and stand up for working families.
# [#]
Toni Atkins Kick-Off
California’s gubernatorial race is picking up steam. Last month, Toni Atkins opened her new campaign headquarters here in Mission Hills! Scott served alongside Toni on the San Diego City Council for 8 years, and worked with her many times since. Not only is Toni a trailblazer, but she also has a proven record of uplifting our state. Toni is the best person for the job, and California will be well-served under her leadership. Scott was one of the earliest endorsers of Toni’s campaign, and he’s still standing strong behind her.
# [#]
Discussing Public Health with the Local Medical Community
While Scott was home last month, he hosted a roundtable discussion with Rep. Sara Jacobs and leaders in San Diego’s medical community. The GOP’s Big Ugly Bill will not only kick millions of Americans off their health insurance and force hospitals to close, but it will also worsen our country’s physician shortage by putting medical school out of reach for many highly qualified students. Scott is working to fight the impending public health disaster and stand up to the Trump Administration’s attacks on health care.
★ ★ ★
Highlighting the Harm of Tariffs on San Diego Businesses and Consumers
Last month, Scott and Rep. Jacobs also hosted a press conference highlighting the damage President Trump’s tariffs are already causing, from sowing economic chaos, to raising prices for hardworking Americans, and weakening the U.S.’s global standing. Scott is pushing back in Congress to protect businesses and families, and keeping up the pressure on Trump to end his reckless trade war.
★ ★ ★
Local Democratic Clubs & Advocacy Groups
Scott spent much of his August recess meeting with community leaders in San Diego, including local Democratic clubs and advocacy groups. He joined the San Marcos Democratic Club Candidate Forum, Carmel Valley Democratic Club Meeting, UCSD UAW Meeting, and the Rancho Bernardo Democratic Club Meeting.
# [#]
Keep up with the latest in California’s 50th by following Scott on social media:FOLLOW ON FACEBOOK » [https://www.facebook.com/scottpeterssandiego/]
FOLLOW ON X » [https://x.com/ScottPetersCA50]
FOLLOW ON INSTAGRAM » [https://www.instagram.com/scottpetersca50]
Thanks for being a part of our team.
– Team PetersDONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sp-2509-fr?amount=10]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/petersfooter?refcode=em_footer&amount=10]
As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom.Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you. Make a contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/petersfooter?refcode=em_footer&amount=10]
Unsubscribe. [https://go.scottpeters.com/p/jHaskSoF-Ei0b44Q3Qkc7Q2?unsubscribedata=SnmEP%2FQyYnizMfmkKcPrOZYrjXSZI1EOxJqgV7O2q%2FACxkkQOqCKZxdSZhs8VnP%2BwQFTkDfqmmBS45SvsKKKVSZbJ7cnyKBPhJ%2FW3%2ByhqFN%2BrPc6gve0TYUbY86EFAz1M93iCz6dieduisH%2FWRLFOCWY8%2FL4uZoODNeJ8DkfOyPkq1tErPZh7QA8ECQuBotBVv4LhbuMuwlqgAqapHeJXSXMOCM4S%2FMVBJPz6WfYpegDOTul1NXesdH55po%2Fwetpx2hqwxC1FvqNYHX2QjaoTGv0cm9RzhkebLEKzvnPjqe%2BYauHXQYNhkvcEZpEYCr3Dm0L5jHhkoSSENmT1I8%2BuiTv76ZiKSkjp0%2FBlYSA8Ee2WTx2UcLfot5Va50bzRRwUJsOwgv%2FEZxQ1av5vm9s2lO6ngIkN0eFO9qtOPqUlKI%3D]

We can’t let the Trump Administration continue to provide evasive answers – the victims deserve justice, and the public deserves answers. Ultimately, this fight is not about politics. It’s about whether survivors finally get the truth and whether the powerful are ever held to the same standard as everyone else. ★ ★ ★ Tijuana River Valley (TRV) Sewage Crisis in the Spotlight Scott has been working tirelessly to secure the funding needed to address the cross-border sewage crisis that has plagued our region for years. After working alongside the San Diego Congressional delegation to secure $650 million for the International Boundary and Water Commission (IBWC), which is enough to fully repair & expand the South Bay International Wastewater Treatment Plan (SBIWTP), Scott is still working to secure additional funding and long-term solutions to protect our communities’ health. This month, a new study was published showing that the sewage crisis is polluting not just our water, but also our air. [] Our community can’t afford any further delay in action. [#] Tackling the Housing Crisis & Supporting Public Transit It’s no secret that our country is experiencing an affordable housing crisis that impacts nearly every aspect of our lives and the economy, especially here in California. Scott recently reintroduced a bipartisan bill to remedy this problem by facilitating the construction of more housing near transit centers. On top of increased access to affordable homes, this proposed investment in public transportation also serves to cut carbon emissions by growing ridership and getting cars off the road. If we’re going to tackle poverty, boost our economies, and help families everywhere to thrive, we must address housing affordability – and that’s what Scott is doing. ★ ★ ★ Fighting for Transparency The Big Ugly Bill guts clean energy programs that would save families money and instead gives handouts to Big Oil, sticking hardworking Americans with higher bills. While Republicans prop up outdated, expensive fossil fuels while sabotaging the affordable clean energy future we need, Scott is fighting back. Last week, he led the New Democrats in introducing budget amendments to hold the GOP accountable for their betrayal of working Americans – and Republicans blocked every single one. With another shutdown deadline looming just a few weeks away, Scott isn’t stopping here. He’s continuing to put forward commonsense, bipartisan proposals and stand up for working families. [#] Toni Atkins Kick-Off California’s gubernatorial race is picking up steam. Last month, Toni Atkins opened her new campaign headquarters here in Mission Hills! Scott served alongside Toni on the San Diego City Council for 8 years, and worked with her many times since. Not only is Toni a trailblazer, but she also has a proven record of uplifting our state. Toni is the best person for the job, and California will be well-served under her leadership. Scott was one of the earliest endorsers of Toni’s campaign, and he’s still standing strong behind her. [#] Discussing Public Health with the Local Medical Community While Scott was home last month, he hosted a roundtable discussion with Rep. Sara Jacobs and leaders in San Diego’s medical community. The GOP’s Big Ugly Bill will not only kick millions of Americans off their health insurance and force hospitals to close, but it will also worsen our country’s physician shortage by putting medical school out of reach for many highly qualified students. Scott is working to fight the impending public health disaster and stand up to the Trump Administration’s attacks on health care. ★ ★ ★ Highlighting the Harm of Tariffs on San Diego Businesses and Consumers Last month, Scott and Rep. Jacobs also hosted a press conference highlighting the damage President Trump’s tariffs are already causing, from sowing economic chaos, to raising prices for hardworking Americans, and weakening the U.S.’s global standing. Scott is pushing back in Congress to protect businesses and families, and keeping up the pressure on Trump to end his reckless trade war. ★ ★ ★ Local Democratic Clubs & Advocacy Groups Scott spent much of his August recess meeting with community leaders in San Diego, including local Democratic clubs and advocacy groups. He joined the San Marcos Democratic Club Candidate Forum, Carmel Valley Democratic Club Meeting, UCSD UAW Meeting, and the Rancho Bernardo Democratic Club Meeting. [#] Keep up with the latest in California’s 50th by following Scott on social media:FOLLOW ON FACEBOOK » [] FOLLOW ON X » [] FOLLOW ON INSTAGRAM » [] Thanks for being a part of our team. – Team PetersDONATE [] DONATE [] As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom.Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you. Make a contribution today. []

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This was the Charlie Kirk I knew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress]
body:
[Charlie Kirk and his family](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1965886448143397050)

People see Charlie Kirk as this vicious political figure, but I knew him.

He was unbelievably well read on Christian and conservative philosophy and he actually lived by those values in his personal life. He had two beautiful children.

I don’t see a divisive political figure I see a human being who didn’t deserve this at all.

[Charlie Kirk and Dan Crenshaw](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1965944941034570022)

This was the Charlie I knew. An intellectual. A fierce debater. Unafraid of any subject. Charlie was incredibly well-read and sophisticated. He explained Christian philosophy better than most theologians ever could. He knew the philosophical roots of conservatism with a deep understanding.

He could explain the founding of Western Civilization and our country with incredible intellectual depth—but also in a way that anyone could understand. He knew that these principles are in danger of being lost and made it his mission to go on college campuses, outside our own echo chambers, and open himself up to debate. Unafraid.

Years ago he was asked by someone why he did this. His response was perfect: ‘when we stop talking, we get civil war.’

Charlie never stopped talking, not even in his last minutes with us.

It should never have cost him his life.

I want this on the record for his children. As the father of a young daughter, I cannot fathom this heartbreak. We must all share the best of Charlie for the sake of his kids, and the true legacy of their father.

God Bless Charlie Kirk and his family.

In Service,

[Congressman and Navy SEAL]

Dan Crenshaw

[twitter](https://twitter.com/DanCrenshawTX)
[facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

[Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress]

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01K4WXCZNXHHYNNQMBXS9KPJT8&r=01K4X139NK2FEETRFRFYPBR3NW).
Team Crenshaw 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1, Box 211
Houston, TX 77024

Charlie Kirk, right, speaks on stage with US President Donald Trump at AmericaFest, Turning Point USA's annual conference, in December 2024. (AFP)
By John F. Di Leo, Opinion Contributor

On September 10, Arlington Heights, Illinois native Charlie Kirk was assassinated while giving a speech at a university in Utah.

Though he never held political office, he was what our Founding Fathers would have identified as a statesman: a man devoted to philosophy and history, active in politics, but not consumed by acquiring public office for himself. Rather, his calling was to support, and even revive, the American culture championed by the original American vision. Charlie Kirk believed in the Judeo-Christian tradition, in Western Civilization, in the philosophy of limited government that made the United States the City on the Hill, the role model republic for the modern world.

And he became a star in our culture, by carrying that message to millions – by writing four books by the age of 30, by starting several organizations, the most important being Turning Point USA. How? By thoughtfully engaging with his audiences, one at a time, cordially, seriously, respectfully.

And for that – yes, for exactly that – he was gunned down, in public, right in front of an audience that included his own young daughter.

We don’t cry for him, personally, because we know that if anyone would be welcomed at the Pearly Gates without needing to stand in line, it’s Charlie Kirk.

But we mourn for his wife and children, for his friends and colleagues, and for a nation whose current second chance for revival is owed in large part to this very special young man’s dedication and talent, these last dozen years.

body:

---
| |
---
| | **YOU’RE INVITED!**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

You’re invited to join us for a campaign kick off fundraiser for **Representative Ryan Chamberlin** on **Thursday, September 25, 2025, at 6:00 p.m.** at the **Hilton Garden Inn Downtown Ocala** (120 E Silver Springs Blvd, Ocala, FL 34470).

**To RSVP, please email:[Makenzi@MHMStrategies.com](mailto:Makenzi@MHMStrategies.com).**

If you would like to contribute to Representative Chamberlin’s re-election campaign via credit card, please use this link:**[https://secure.anedot.com/ryan-chamberlin-campaign/sept25-ocala](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=240be589e3&e=d1c1b9864f "https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__secure.anedot.com_ryan-2Dchamberlin-2Dcampaign_sept25-2Docala&d=DwMFaQ&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=37db_uDBvccZcNSwuR-gStJNp_oiP3XGlulr1HJPbrg&m=1x7uaWO42rU2ja7A0jzvNj2VJyLtXiOWekZAl4v3Uz78scufnKVEj4tQPtzauZO6&s=PyYTuXuUdblIM9ORsuy1wnZqP9Pm9_7BdVie1ONApjY&e=")**.

If you would like to bring a check to the event, **please make the check payable to _Ryan Chamberlin Campaign_**. The campaign can accept $1,000 per person or business. **Friends of Ryan Chamberlin** can accept unlimited donations.

**Thank you for your continued support of Representative Chamberlin!**

Please see the invitation included below.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Yesterday’s shootings
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends,
Just moments after Charlie Kirk was shot yesterday in Utah, we learned of another shooting at Evergreen High School in Colorado — which left two students injured.
**Only in America is news about a shooting interrupted by another shooting.**
This is not a left or right issue. Gun violence affects us all, no matter where you live or who you voted for. Every day we choose not to act makes all of our communities less safe.
We cannot live like this.
We have the answers to help save lives from gun violence. Commonsense solutions including universal background checks, closing dangerous loopholes, and extreme risk protection orders to ensure guns don’t fall into the hands of people who shouldn’t have access to them.
**But we need our leaders to find the courage to take action and protect our communities.**
That is our mission at GIFFORDS. We’ve worked to help pass more than 700 laws in Congress and across the country to stand up to the gun lobby and protect our communities from gun violence.
We will continue working to fight for laws, policies, and programs proven to save lives.
[**If you would like to support our work, please contribute to GIFFORDS PAC using this link.** _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&amount=3&refcode=em250911-1-b&t=20&akid=10866%2E3935704%2EgZ_Tst)**

---

---

---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-sep25.fqUxQD&refcode=em250911-1-b&t=24&akid=10866%2E3935704%2EgZ_Tst)**
---
**** | **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&refcode=em250911-1-b&t=25&akid=10866%2E3935704%2EgZ_Tst)**
---
****
Thank you, — GIFFORDS

Please, take a second to read this... As a victim of political violence, Gabby Giffords has led the fight to save more lives from gun violence for more than a decade, but she can’t do it alone. If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to pass commonsense gun safety legislation across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can. **If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.** **[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-sep25.Kx2kIW&refcode=em250911-1-b&t=26&akid=10866%2E3935704%2EgZ_Tst)**
Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=10866%2E3935704%2EgZ_Tst) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
